title: Select all students
description: Prikaži sve kolone i sve redove iz tabele students.
hint: Koristi SELECT * i FROM students.
solution:
SELECT *
FROM students;

title: Select student names
description: Prikaži samo first_name i last_name iz tabele students.
hint: U SELECT delu navedi samo kolone koje želiš da prikažeš.
solution:
SELECT first_name, last_name
FROM students;

title: Column alias
description: Prikaži titulu (title), ime i prezime svakog profesora u jednoj koloni nazvanoj 'puno_ime'. Koristi || za spajanje stringova.
hint: Koristi AS za alias. Spajanje: title || ' ' || first_name || ' ' || last_name

title: Filter by enrollment year
description: Prikaži sve studente koji su upisani 2022. godine.
hint: Koristi WHERE enrollment_year = ...

title: Filter subjects by ECTS
description: Prikaži sve predmete koji nose 6 ili više ECTS bodova.
hint: Koristi WHERE ects >= ...

title: Filter with LIKE
description: Prikaži sve profesore čije prezime počinje slovom 'P'.
hint: Koristi WHERE last_name LIKE 'P%'

title: Sort subjects by ECTS
description: Prikaži sve predmete sortirane po broju ECTS bodova od najvišeg ka najnižem.
hint: Koristi ORDER BY ects DESC

title: Sort students alphabetically
description: Prikaži prvih 10 studenata sortiranih po prezimenu abecedno.
hint: Koristi ORDER BY last_name ASC i LIMIT 10
solution:
SELECT *
FROM students
ORDER BY last_name ASC
LIMIT 10;

title: Count all students
description: Koliko ukupno studenata ima u bazi?
hint: Koristi COUNT(*)
solution:
SELECT COUNT(*) AS total_students
FROM students;

title: Min and max exam grade
description: Prikaži minimalnu i maksimalnu ocenu iz svih ispita.
hint: Koristi MIN() i MAX()
solution:
SELECT
  MIN(grade) AS min_grade,
  MAX(grade) AS max_grade
FROM exams;

title: Students per faculty
description: Prikaži koliko studenata ima na svakom fakultetu (faculty_id). Sortiraj po broju studenata opadajuće.
hint: Koristi GROUP BY faculty_id i COUNT(*)
solution:
SELECT
  faculty_id,
  COUNT(*) AS num_students
FROM students
GROUP BY faculty_id
ORDER BY num_students DESC;

title: Average ECTS per semester
description: Prikaži prosečan broj ECTS bodova po semestru. Sortiraj po semestru rastuće.
hint: Koristi GROUP BY semester i ROUND(AVG(ects), 2)
solution:
SELECT
  semester,
  ROUND(AVG(ects), 2) AS avg_ects
FROM subjects
GROUP BY semester
ORDER BY semester;

title: Faculties with many students
description: Prikaži samo one faculty_id gde je broj studenata veći od 10. Sortiraj opadajuće.
hint: Koristi GROUP BY pa HAVING COUNT(*) > 10
solution:
SELECT
  faculty_id,
  COUNT(*) AS num_students
FROM students
GROUP BY faculty_id
HAVING COUNT(*) > 10
ORDER BY num_students DESC;

title: Students with department names
description: Prikaži ime i prezime studenta i naziv departmana kojem pripada.
hint: Spoji students i departments koristeći s.department_id = d.id
solution:
SELECT
  s.first_name,
  s.last_name,
  d.name AS department_name
FROM students s
INNER JOIN departments d
  ON s.department_id = d.id
ORDER BY d.name, s.last_name;

title: Exams with student and subject
description: Prikaži ime i prezime studenta, naziv predmeta i ocenu iz ispita.
hint: JOIN exams sa students (student_id) i subjects (subject_id)
solution:
SELECT
  st.first_name,
  st.last_name,
  sub.name AS subject_name,
  e.grade
FROM exams e
INNER JOIN students st
  ON e.student_id = st.id
INNER JOIN subjects sub
  ON e.subject_id = sub.id
ORDER BY e.grade DESC;

title: Professors with departments
description: Prikaži ime i prezime profesora i naziv departmana kojem pripada.
hint: Spoji professors i departments koristeći p.department_id = d.id
solution:
SELECT
  p.first_name,
  p.last_name,
  d.name AS department_name
FROM professors p
INNER JOIN departments d
  ON p.department_id = d.id
ORDER BY d.name, p.last_name;

title: All departments with student count
description: Prikaži sve departmane, uključujući i one koji nemaju studenata. Za svaki departman prikaži naziv i broj studenata.
hint: Počni od departments, LEFT JOIN sa students. Koristi COUNT(s.id) — ne COUNT(*) — da brojiš samo postojeće studente.
solution:
SELECT
  d.name AS department_name,
  COUNT(s.id) AS num_students
FROM departments d
LEFT JOIN students s
  ON d.id = s.department_id
GROUP BY d.id, d.name
ORDER BY num_students DESC;

title: Subjects above average ECTS
description: Prikaži sve predmete koji imaju više ECTS bodova od proseka svih predmeta.
hint: Koristi skalarni subquery: WHERE ects > (SELECT AVG(ects) FROM subjects)
solution:
SELECT *
FROM subjects
WHERE ects > (
  SELECT AVG(ects)
  FROM subjects
)
ORDER BY ects DESC, name;

title: Top grade per student
description: Za svakog studenta koji ima položen ispit prikaži ime, prezime i njegovu/njenu najvišu ocenu.
hint: Koristi subquery u FROM: SELECT student_id, MAX(grade) AS max_grade FROM exams GROUP BY student_id, pa JOIN sa students.
solution:
SELECT
  s.first_name,
  s.last_name,
  top.max_grade
FROM students s
INNER JOIN (
  SELECT student_id, MAX(grade) AS max_grade
  FROM exams
  GROUP BY student_id
) top ON s.id = top.student_id
ORDER BY top.max_grade DESC, s.last_name;

title: Faculty summary
description: Za svaki fakultet prikaži naziv, grad, broj studenata i prosečnu ocenu ispita studenata tog fakulteta. Sortiraj po prosečnoj oceni opadajuće.
hint: JOIN faculties → students → exams. Koristi COUNT(DISTINCT s.id) i ROUND(AVG(e.grade), 2). GROUP BY f.id, f.name, f.city.
solution:
SELECT
  f.name AS faculty_name,
  f.city,
  COUNT(DISTINCT s.id) AS num_students,
  ROUND(AVG(e.grade), 2) AS avg_grade
FROM faculties f
LEFT JOIN students s
  ON f.id = s.faculty_id
LEFT JOIN exams e
  ON s.id = e.student_id
GROUP BY f.id, f.name, f.city
ORDER BY avg_grade DESC NULLS LAST;

title: Select all faculties
description: Prikaži sve podatke iz tabele faculties.
hint: Koristi SELECT * nad tabelom faculties.
solution:
SELECT *
FROM faculties;

title: Select faculty names and cities
description: Prikaži naziv fakulteta i grad iz tabele faculties.
hint: Potrebne su ti kolone name i city.
solution:
SELECT name, city
FROM faculties;

title: Select subjects with semester and ECTS
description: Prikaži naziv predmeta, semestar i broj ECTS bodova iz tabele subjects.
hint: Iz tabele subjects izaberi kolone name, semester i ects.
solution:
SELECT name, semester, ects
FROM subjects;

title: Select professor names
description: Prikaži ime i prezime svih profesora.
hint: Koristi kolone first_name i last_name iz tabele professors.
solution:
SELECT first_name, last_name
FROM professors;

title: Select faculty names with aliases
description: Prikaži naziv fakulteta i grad, ali koristi aliase faculty_name i faculty_city.
hint: Alias se dodaje pomoću AS.
solution:
SELECT name AS faculty_name, city AS faculty_city
FROM faculties;

title: Select distinct faculty cities
description: Prikaži jedinstvene gradove u kojima postoje fakulteti.
hint: Koristi DISTINCT nad kolonom city.
solution:
SELECT DISTINCT city
FROM faculties;

title: Select first 5 subjects
description: Prikaži prvih 5 predmeta iz tabele subjects.
hint: Koristi LIMIT 5.

title: Select exam basic information
description: Prikaži student_id, subject_id, grade i passed iz tabele exams.
hint: Izaberi samo tražene kolone iz tabele exams.
solution:
SELECT student_id, subject_id, grade, passed
FROM exams;

title: Find professors with title 'docent'
description: Prikaži ime, prezime i email svih profesora sa titulom 'docent'.
hint: Koristi WHERE title = 'docent'

title: Find faculties in Belgrade
description: Prikaži sve fakultete koji se nalaze u Beogradu.
hint: Koristi WHERE city = 'Beograd'

title: Filter students with AND
description: Prikaži studente sa ETF fakulteta (faculty_id = 2) koji su upisani 2022. godine.
hint: Kombinuj dva uslova sa AND: faculty_id = 2 AND enrollment_year = 2022
solution:
SELECT first_name, last_name, index_number
FROM students
WHERE faculty_id = 2
  AND enrollment_year = 2022;

title: Filter students enrolled in 2021 or 2023
description: Prikaži sve studente koji su upisani 2021. ili 2023. godine. Sortiraj po godini upisa, pa po prezimenu.
hint: Koristi OR: enrollment_year = 2021 OR enrollment_year = 2023
solution:
SELECT first_name, last_name, enrollment_year
FROM students
WHERE enrollment_year = 2021
   OR enrollment_year = 2023
ORDER BY enrollment_year, last_name;

title: Filter exams with BETWEEN
description: Prikaži sve ispite gde je ocena između 8 i 10 (uključujući obe granice). Sortiraj po oceni opadajuće.
hint: Koristi WHERE grade BETWEEN 8 AND 10
solution:
SELECT *
FROM exams
WHERE grade BETWEEN 8 AND 10
ORDER BY grade DESC;

title: Filter subjects with IN
description: Prikaži sve predmete koji se slušaju u semestru 1, 2 ili 3. Sortiraj po semestru, pa po nazivu.
hint: Koristi WHERE semester IN (1, 2, 3)
solution:
SELECT name, semester, ects
FROM subjects
WHERE semester IN (1, 2, 3)
ORDER BY semester, name;

title: Students without department
description: Prikaži sve studente koji nemaju dodeljen departman (department_id je NULL). Sortiraj po prezimenu.
hint: Koristi WHERE department_id IS NULL. Napomena: ako upit vrati 0 redova, to znači da svaki student u bazi ima dodeljen departman — to je ispravan rezultat.
solution:
SELECT first_name, last_name, index_number
FROM students
WHERE department_id IS NULL
ORDER BY last_name;

title: Faculties outside Belgrade
description: Prikaži sve fakultete koji se NISU u Beogradu. Sortiraj po gradu, pa po nazivu.
hint: Koristi WHERE city NOT IN ('Beograd') ili WHERE city <> 'Beograd'
solution:
SELECT name, city, university_name
FROM faculties
WHERE city NOT IN ('Beograd')
ORDER BY city, name;

title: Case-insensitive search with ILIKE
description: Prikaži sve profesore čiji email sadrži 'etf' (case-insensitive pretraga).
hint: Koristi ILIKE sa wildcardima: WHERE email ILIKE '%etf%'

title: High-ECTS subjects in early semesters
description: Prikaži predmete koji imaju 8 ili više ECTS bodova I slušaju se u semestru 1 ili 2. Sortiraj po ECTS opadajuće.
hint: Kombinuj: ects >= 8 AND semester IN (1, 2)
solution:
SELECT name, semester, ects
FROM subjects
WHERE ects >= 8
  AND semester IN (1, 2)
ORDER BY ects DESC, semester;

title: Sort professors alphabetically
description: Prikaži ime, prezime i titulu svih profesora sortiranih po prezimenu abecedno.
hint: Koristi ORDER BY last_name ASC

title: Sort exams by grade (best first)
description: Prikaži sve ispite sortirane od najviše ka najnižoj oceni.
hint: Koristi ORDER BY grade DESC

title: Sort faculties alphabetically
description: Prikaži naziv i grad svih fakulteta sortiranih po nazivu abecedno.
hint: Koristi ORDER BY name ASC

title: Sort students by enrollment year
description: Prikaži ime, prezime i godinu upisa svih studenata sortiranih po godini upisa rastuće.
hint: Koristi ORDER BY enrollment_year ASC

title: Sort subjects by faculty and ECTS
description: Prikaži predmete sortirane po faculty_id rastuće, a unutar istog fakulteta po ECTS opadajuće.
hint: Koristi ORDER BY sa dva kriterijuma: faculty_id ASC, ects DESC

title: Top 5 subjects by ECTS
description: Prikaži 5 predmeta sa najvećim brojem ECTS bodova.
hint: Koristi ORDER BY ects DESC zajedno sa LIMIT 5
solution:
SELECT name, ects, semester
FROM subjects
ORDER BY ects DESC
LIMIT 5;

title: Sort professors by title then name
description: Prikaži profesore sortirane po tituli abecedno, a unutar iste titule po prezimenu abecedno.
hint: Koristi ORDER BY title ASC, last_name ASC

title: Sort students with NULLs last
description: Prikaži ime, prezime i department_id svih studenata sortiranih po department_id rastuće — studenti bez departmana treba da budu na kraju.
hint: Koristi ORDER BY department_id ASC NULLS LAST

title: Pagination: second page of students
description: Prikaži drugu stranicu studenata: studente od 11. do 20. mesta sortirane po prezimenu i imenu.
hint: Koristi ORDER BY last_name, first_name zatim LIMIT 10 OFFSET 10
solution:
SELECT first_name, last_name
FROM students
ORDER BY last_name ASC, first_name ASC
LIMIT 10 OFFSET 10;

title: Sort with custom priority using CASE
description: Prikaži ispite sortirane tako da se ocena 10 prikaže prva, zatim ostatak opadajuće po oceni. Dodaj kolonu sort_priority koja pokazuje prioritet (0 za ocenu 10, 1 za ostale).
hint: Koristi CASE u ORDER BY: CASE WHEN grade = 10 THEN 0 ELSE 1 END
solution:
SELECT
  student_id,
  subject_id,
  grade,
  CASE WHEN grade = 10 THEN 0 ELSE 1 END AS sort_priority
FROM exams
ORDER BY
  CASE WHEN grade = 10 THEN 0 ELSE 1 END ASC,
  grade DESC;

title: Sort subjects by computed weight
description: Za svaki predmet izračunaj 'težinu' kao ects * semester. Prikaži predmete sortirane po ovoj vrednosti opadajuće.
hint: Dodaj computed kolonu u SELECT, a zatim je koristi u ORDER BY.
solution:
SELECT
  name,
  semester,
  ects,
  ects * semester AS weight
FROM subjects
ORDER BY weight DESC;

title: Complex multi-column sort with NULLs
description: Prikaži predmete sortirane po ECTS opadajuće, zatim po semestru rastuće. Predmeti bez department_id treba da budu na kraju.
hint: Kombinuj više ORDER BY kriterijuma i NULLS LAST za nullable kolonu.
solution:
SELECT name, semester, ects, department_id
FROM subjects
ORDER BY
  ects DESC,
  semester ASC,
  department_id ASC NULLS LAST;

title: Count all professors
description: Koliko ukupno profesora postoji u bazi?
hint: Koristi COUNT(*) nad tabelom professors.
solution:
SELECT COUNT(*) AS total_professors
FROM professors;

title: Sum of all ECTS
description: Koliki je ukupan broj ECTS bodova za sve predmete zajedno?
hint: Koristi SUM(ects) nad tabelom subjects.
solution:
SELECT SUM(ects) AS total_ects
FROM subjects;

title: Average exam grade
description: Kolika je prosečna ocena na svim ispitima? Zaokruži na 2 decimale.
hint: Koristi ROUND(AVG(grade), 2)
solution:
SELECT ROUND(AVG(grade), 2) AS avg_grade
FROM exams;

title: Min and max enrollment year
description: Koje su najranija i najkasnija godina upisa studenata u bazi?
hint: Koristi MIN(enrollment_year) i MAX(enrollment_year) zajedno.
solution:
SELECT
  MIN(enrollment_year) AS first_enrolled,
  MAX(enrollment_year) AS last_enrolled
FROM students;

title: Count distinct semesters
description: Koliko različitih semestara postoji u tabeli subjects?
hint: Koristi COUNT(DISTINCT semester)
solution:
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT semester) AS num_semesters
FROM subjects;

title: Count passed exams
description: Koliko ispita je položeno (passed = true)?
hint: Koristi COUNT(*) uz WHERE passed = true

title: Average grade for passing exams
description: Kolika je prosečna ocena samo za položene ispite? Zaokruži na 2 decimale.
hint: Filtriraj na passed = true pre računanja proseka.

title: Total ECTS for first semester subjects
description: Koliko ukupno ECTS bodova nose predmeti koji se slušaju u prvom semestru?
hint: Filtriraj na semester = 1, pa upotrebi SUM(ects).

title: Exam statistics in one query
description: Prikaži ukupan broj ispita, prosečnu ocenu, minimalnu i maksimalnu ocenu — sve u jednom redu.
hint: Možeš koristiti više agregatnih funkcija u jednom SELECT-u.
solution:
SELECT
  COUNT(*)             AS total_exams,
  ROUND(AVG(grade), 2) AS avg_grade,
  MIN(grade)           AS min_grade,
  MAX(grade)           AS max_grade
FROM exams;

title: Count distinct students and subjects in exams
description: Koliko različitih studenata i koliko različitih predmeta se pojavljuje u tabeli exams?
hint: Koristi COUNT(DISTINCT student_id) i COUNT(DISTINCT subject_id).
solution:
SELECT
  COUNT(DISTINCT student_id) AS unique_students,
  COUNT(DISTINCT subject_id) AS unique_subjects
FROM exams;

title: Count excellent and perfect grades
description: Prikaži ukupan broj ispita, broj ocena >= 9 i broj savršenih ocena (10). Koristi FILTER klauzulu.
hint: PostgreSQL podržava COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE uslov) za uslovne agregacije.
solution:
SELECT
  COUNT(*) AS total_exams,
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE grade >= 9) AS excellent_count,
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE grade = 10) AS perfect_count
FROM exams;

title: Total vs unique students in exams
description: Prikaži ukupan broj redova u exams, broj jedinstvenih studenata i razliku između ta dva broja.
hint: Razlika između COUNT(*) i COUNT(DISTINCT student_id) pokazuje koliko 'ekstra' ispita ima u sistemu.
solution:
SELECT
  COUNT(*)                              AS total_entries,
  COUNT(DISTINCT student_id)            AS unique_students,
  COUNT(*) - COUNT(DISTINCT student_id) AS extra_exams
FROM exams;

title: Calculate pass rate percentage
description: Izračunaj procenat položenosti ispita. Prikaži kao decimalni broj od 0 do 100 zaokružen na 2 decimale.
hint: Koristi FILTER(WHERE passed). Množenje sa 100.0 (ne 100) osigurava decimalni rezultat.

title: Subjects per faculty with totals
description: Za svaki faculty_id prikaži broj predmeta i ukupan broj ECTS bodova. Sortiraj po faculty_id.
hint: Grupiši po faculty_id i koristi COUNT(*) i SUM(ects).
solution:
SELECT
  faculty_id,
  COUNT(*) AS num_subjects,
  SUM(ects) AS total_ects
FROM subjects
GROUP BY faculty_id
ORDER BY faculty_id;

title: Professors by title
description: Prikaži koliko profesora ima svake titule. Sortiraj po broju profesora opadajuće.
hint: GROUP BY title, COUNT(*)
solution:
SELECT
  title,
  COUNT(*) AS num_professors
FROM professors
GROUP BY title
ORDER BY num_professors DESC;

title: Average grade per student
description: Za svakog studenta (student_id) prikaži prosečnu ocenu i ukupan broj ispita. Sortiraj po prosečnoj oceni opadajuće.
hint: GROUP BY student_id, koristi ROUND(AVG(grade), 2) i COUNT(*)
solution:
SELECT
  student_id,
  ROUND(AVG(grade), 2) AS avg_grade,
  COUNT(*) AS num_exams
FROM exams
GROUP BY student_id
ORDER BY avg_grade DESC;

title: Students by enrollment year and faculty
description: Prikaži broj studenata grupisan po godini upisa i faculty_id. Sortiraj po godini, pa po faculty_id.
hint: GROUP BY enrollment_year, faculty_id
solution:
SELECT
  enrollment_year,
  faculty_id,
  COUNT(*) AS num_students
FROM students
GROUP BY enrollment_year, faculty_id
ORDER BY enrollment_year, faculty_id;

title: Subject statistics per semester
description: Za svaki semestar prikaži broj predmeta, prosečan ECTS i ukupan ECTS. Sortiraj po semestru.
hint: GROUP BY semester, koristi COUNT(*), ROUND(AVG(ects), 2) i SUM(ects).
solution:
SELECT
  semester,
  COUNT(*)             AS num_subjects,
  ROUND(AVG(ects), 2) AS avg_ects,
  SUM(ects)            AS total_ects
FROM subjects
GROUP BY semester
ORDER BY semester;

title: Students with more than 1 exam
description: Prikaži student_id i broj ispita za studente koji su izašli na više od 1 ispita. Sortiraj opadajuće.
hint: GROUP BY student_id, zatim HAVING COUNT(*) > 1
solution:
SELECT
  student_id,
  COUNT(*) AS exam_count
FROM exams
GROUP BY student_id
HAVING COUNT(*) > 1
ORDER BY exam_count DESC;

title: Professors teaching more than 3 subjects
description: Prikaži professor_id i broj predmeta za profesore koji predaju više od 3 predmeta.
hint: GROUP BY professor_id iz tabele professor_subjects, HAVING COUNT(*) > 3
solution:
SELECT
  professor_id,
  COUNT(*) AS num_subjects
FROM professor_subjects
GROUP BY professor_id
HAVING COUNT(*) > 3
ORDER BY num_subjects DESC;

title: Semesters with high total ECTS
description: Prikaži semestar i ukupan ECTS, ali samo za semestar gde ukupan ECTS prelazi 40. Sortiraj opadajuće.
hint: GROUP BY semester, HAVING SUM(ects) > 40
solution:
SELECT
  semester,
  SUM(ects) AS total_ects
FROM subjects
GROUP BY semester
HAVING SUM(ects) > 40
ORDER BY total_ects DESC;

title: Faculties with more than 12 students
description: Prikaži faculty_id sa više od 12 studenata, zajedno sa brojem studenata. Sortiraj opadajuće.
hint: GROUP BY faculty_id, HAVING COUNT(*) > 12
solution:
SELECT
  faculty_id,
  COUNT(*) AS num_students
FROM students
GROUP BY faculty_id
HAVING COUNT(*) > 12
ORDER BY num_students DESC;

title: Semesters with multiple HAVING conditions
description: Prikaži semestar, broj predmeta i ukupan ECTS samo za semestar koji ima barem 2 predmeta I ukupan ECTS veći od 10.
hint: HAVING može imati više uslova spojenih sa AND.
solution:
SELECT
  semester,
  COUNT(*) AS num_subjects,
  SUM(ects) AS total_ects
FROM subjects
GROUP BY semester
HAVING COUNT(*) >= 2
   AND SUM(ects) > 10
ORDER BY total_ects DESC;

title: Students with average grade above 8
description: Prikaži student_id, prosečnu ocenu i broj ispita za studente čija je prosečna ocena veća od 8. Sortiraj opadajuće.
hint: Koristi HAVING AVG(grade) > 8 — HAVING filtrira po agregatnoj vrednosti, ne po pojedinačnom redu.
solution:
SELECT
  student_id,
  ROUND(AVG(grade), 2) AS avg_grade,
  COUNT(*) AS num_exams
FROM exams
GROUP BY student_id
HAVING AVG(grade) > 8
ORDER BY avg_grade DESC;

title: Faculty + year cohorts with enough students
description: Za svaku kombinaciju faculty_id i enrollment_year prikaži broj studenata. Prikaži samo kombinacije sa barem 3 studenta, sortirane po broju studenata opadajuće.
hint: GROUP BY dva polja (faculty_id, enrollment_year), HAVING COUNT(*) >= 3
solution:
SELECT
  faculty_id,
  enrollment_year,
  COUNT(*) AS student_count
FROM students
GROUP BY faculty_id, enrollment_year
HAVING COUNT(*) >= 3
ORDER BY student_count DESC, enrollment_year;

title: Pass rate per subject using FILTER
description: Za svaki predmet prikaži broj pokušaja, broj položenih ispita, procenat položenosti i prosečnu ocenu. Sortiraj po procentu položenosti rastuće.
hint: Koristi COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE passed) za uslovne agregacije unutar GROUP BY.
solution:
SELECT
  subject_id,
  COUNT(*) AS total_attempts,
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE passed) AS passed_count,
  ROUND(
    100.0 * COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE passed) / COUNT(*),
    1
  ) AS pass_rate_pct,
  ROUND(AVG(grade), 2) AS avg_grade
FROM exams
GROUP BY subject_id
ORDER BY pass_rate_pct ASC, avg_grade ASC;

title: Departments with faculty names
description: Prikaži naziv svakog departmana zajedno sa nazivom i gradom fakulteta kojemu pripada.
hint: Spoji departments i faculties koristeći d.faculty_id = f.id
solution:
SELECT
  d.name AS department_name,
  f.name AS faculty_name,
  f.city
FROM departments d
INNER JOIN faculties f
  ON d.faculty_id = f.id
ORDER BY f.name, d.name;

title: Subjects with faculty names
description: Prikaži naziv svakog predmeta, broj ECTS bodova i naziv fakulteta na kojem se predaje.
hint: Spoji subjects i faculties koristeći sub.faculty_id = f.id
solution:
SELECT
  sub.name AS subject_name,
  sub.ects,
  f.name AS faculty_name
FROM subjects sub
INNER JOIN faculties f
  ON sub.faculty_id = f.id
ORDER BY f.name, sub.name;

title: Exams with student names
description: Prikaži ime i prezime studenta, datum ispita i ocenu za svaki ispit. Sortiraj po datumu ispita opadajuće.
hint: Spoji exams i students koristeći e.student_id = s.id
solution:
SELECT
  s.first_name,
  s.last_name,
  e.exam_date,
  e.grade
FROM exams e
INNER JOIN students s
  ON e.student_id = s.id
ORDER BY e.exam_date DESC, s.last_name;

title: Exams with subject names
description: Prikaži naziv predmeta, ocenu i datum ispita za svaki ispit. Sortiraj po nazivu predmeta, pa po oceni opadajuće.
hint: Spoji exams i subjects koristeći e.subject_id = sub.id
solution:
SELECT
  sub.name AS subject_name,
  e.grade,
  e.exam_date
FROM exams e
INNER JOIN subjects sub
  ON e.subject_id = sub.id
ORDER BY sub.name, e.grade DESC;

title: Students with faculty names
description: Prikaži ime, prezime i broj indeksa studenta zajedno sa nazivom fakulteta na kojem studira.
hint: Spoji students i faculties koristeći s.faculty_id = f.id
solution:
SELECT
  s.first_name,
  s.last_name,
  s.index_number,
  f.name AS faculty_name
FROM students s
INNER JOIN faculties f
  ON s.faculty_id = f.id
ORDER BY f.name, s.last_name;

title: Students with department and faculty
description: Za svakog studenta koji ima dodeljen departman prikaži ime, prezime, naziv departmana i naziv fakulteta. Sortiraj po fakultetu, pa po departmanu, pa po prezimenu.
hint: JOIN tri tabele: students → departments (department_id), students → faculties (faculty_id). Koristi WHERE department_id IS NOT NULL ili INNER JOIN koji automatski isključuje NULL.
solution:
SELECT
  s.first_name,
  s.last_name,
  d.name AS department_name,
  f.name AS faculty_name
FROM students s
INNER JOIN departments d ON s.department_id = d.id
INNER JOIN faculties f  ON s.faculty_id  = f.id
ORDER BY f.name, d.name, s.last_name;

title: Exams with subject and faculty
description: Prikaži naziv fakulteta, naziv predmeta i ocenu za svaki ispit. Sortiraj po nazivu fakulteta, pa po predmetu.
hint: JOIN tri tabele: exams → subjects (subject_id) → faculties (faculty_id)
solution:
SELECT
  f.name AS faculty_name,
  sub.name AS subject_name,
  e.grade
FROM exams e
INNER JOIN subjects sub ON e.subject_id  = sub.id
INNER JOIN faculties f  ON sub.faculty_id = f.id
ORDER BY f.name, sub.name, e.grade DESC;

title: Professors with department and faculty
description: Prikaži titulu, ime i prezime profesora zajedno sa nazivom departmana i nazivom fakulteta. Sortiraj po fakultetu, pa po departmanu.
hint: JOIN tri tabele: professors → departments (department_id) → faculties (faculty_id). Departmani su vezani za fakultete.
solution:
SELECT
  p.title,
  p.first_name,
  p.last_name,
  d.name AS department_name,
  f.name AS faculty_name
FROM professors p
INNER JOIN departments d ON p.department_id = d.id
INNER JOIN faculties f  ON d.faculty_id   = f.id
ORDER BY f.name, d.name, p.last_name;

title: Subjects with optional department and faculty
description: Prikaži naziv predmeta, ECTS, naziv fakulteta i naziv departmana (ako postoji). Predmeti bez departmana treba da se pojave sa NULL u koloni department_name.
hint: Na faculty_id koristi INNER JOIN (ne može biti NULL), a na department_id koristi LEFT JOIN jer je nullable.
solution:
SELECT
  sub.name AS subject_name,
  sub.ects,
  f.name  AS faculty_name,
  d.name  AS department_name
FROM subjects sub
INNER JOIN faculties f   ON sub.faculty_id    = f.id
LEFT  JOIN departments d ON sub.department_id = d.id
ORDER BY f.name, sub.name;

title: Exams with full context
description: Za svaki ispit prikaži ime i prezime studenta, naziv predmeta, ime i prezime profesora koji je ocijenio ispit, datum i ocenu. Sortiraj po datumu opadajuće.
hint: Tabela exams ima student_id, subject_id i professor_id — spoji sve četiri tabele. Koristi aliase za jasnoću.
solution:
SELECT
  s.first_name  || ' ' || s.last_name  AS student,
  sub.name                             AS subject_name,
  p.first_name  || ' ' || p.last_name  AS professor,
  e.exam_date,
  e.grade
FROM exams e
INNER JOIN students   s   ON e.student_id   = s.id
INNER JOIN subjects   sub ON e.subject_id   = sub.id
INNER JOIN professors p   ON e.professor_id = p.id
ORDER BY e.exam_date DESC, sub.name;

title: Professors and their assigned subjects
description: Prikaži titulu, ime i prezime svakog profesora zajedno sa nazivima predmeta koje predaje (prema tabeli professor_subjects). Sortiraj po prezimenu profesora, pa po nazivu predmeta.
hint: professor_subjects je vezna tabela many-to-many. Spoji: professors → professor_subjects → subjects.
solution:
SELECT
  p.title,
  p.first_name,
  p.last_name,
  sub.name AS subject_name,
  sub.ects
FROM professors p
INNER JOIN professor_subjects ps ON p.id          = ps.professor_id
INNER JOIN subjects          sub ON ps.subject_id  = sub.id
ORDER BY p.last_name, sub.name;

title: Number of subjects per professor
description: Za svakog profesora prikaži titulu, ime, prezime i broj predmeta koje predaje (iz professor_subjects). Uključi i profesore koji ne predaju nijedan predmet. Sortiraj po broju predmeta opadajuće.
hint: Koristi LEFT JOIN da uključiš profesore bez predmeta. COUNT(ps.subject_id) — ne COUNT(*) — broji samo sparene redove.
solution:
SELECT
  p.title,
  p.first_name,
  p.last_name,
  COUNT(ps.subject_id) AS num_subjects
FROM professors p
LEFT JOIN professor_subjects ps ON p.id = ps.professor_id
GROUP BY p.id, p.title, p.first_name, p.last_name
ORDER BY num_subjects DESC, p.last_name;

title: Subjects taught by multiple professors
description: Prikaži naziv predmeta i broj profesora koji ga predaju — ali samo za predmete koje predaju dva ili više profesora. Sortiraj po broju profesora opadajuće.
hint: JOIN subjects i professor_subjects, GROUP BY subject, HAVING COUNT(...) >= 2
solution:
SELECT
  sub.name AS subject_name,
  sub.ects,
  COUNT(ps.professor_id) AS num_professors
FROM subjects sub
INNER JOIN professor_subjects ps ON sub.id = ps.subject_id
GROUP BY sub.id, sub.name, sub.ects
HAVING COUNT(ps.professor_id) >= 2
ORDER BY num_professors DESC, sub.name;

title: Professors without assigned subjects
description: Pronađi profesore koji nemaju nijedan predmet dodeljen u tabeli professor_subjects. Prikaži njihovo ime, prezime i titulu.
hint: LEFT JOIN professors sa professor_subjects. Tamo gdje nema para, ps.professor_id će biti NULL.
solution:
SELECT
  p.first_name,
  p.last_name,
  p.title
FROM professors p
LEFT JOIN professor_subjects ps ON p.id = ps.professor_id
WHERE ps.professor_id IS NULL
ORDER BY p.last_name;

title: Subjects without assigned professors
description: Pronađi predmete koji nemaju nijednog profesora u tabeli professor_subjects. Prikaži naziv predmeta, ECTS i semestar.
hint: LEFT JOIN subjects sa professor_subjects. Gdje nema para, ps.subject_id će biti NULL.
solution:
SELECT
  sub.name AS subject_name,
  sub.ects,
  sub.semester
FROM subjects sub
LEFT JOIN professor_subjects ps ON sub.id = ps.subject_id
WHERE ps.subject_id IS NULL
ORDER BY sub.name;

title: Average grade per professor
description: Za svakog profesora koji je ocijenio bar jedan ispit prikaži ime, prezime, titulu, broj ispita i prosečnu ocenu. Sortiraj po prosečnoj oceni opadajuće.
hint: Tabela exams ima professor_id. JOIN professors i exams, GROUP BY professor, ROUND(AVG(grade), 2).
solution:
SELECT
  p.first_name,
  p.last_name,
  p.title,
  COUNT(*) AS total_exams,
  ROUND(AVG(e.grade), 2) AS avg_grade
FROM professors p
INNER JOIN exams e ON p.id = e.professor_id
GROUP BY p.id, p.first_name, p.last_name, p.title
ORDER BY avg_grade DESC;

title: Subjects never taken as exam
description: Prikaži sve predmete koji nikad nisu bili predmet ispita — ne pojavljuju se ni u jednom redu tabele exams.
hint: Koristi WHERE id NOT IN (SELECT DISTINCT subject_id FROM exams). Napomena: ako upit vrati 0 redova, to znači da su svi predmeti u bazi bili korišćeni na bar jednom ispitu — to je ispravan rezultat.
solution:
SELECT id, name, ects, semester
FROM subjects
WHERE id NOT IN (
  SELECT DISTINCT subject_id
  FROM exams
)
ORDER BY name;

title: Students who have taken at least one exam
description: Prikaži ime, prezime i broj indeksa studenata koji su izašli na bar jedan ispit.
hint: Koristi WHERE id IN (SELECT DISTINCT student_id FROM exams)
solution:
SELECT first_name, last_name, index_number
FROM students
WHERE id IN (
  SELECT DISTINCT student_id
  FROM exams
)
ORDER BY last_name, first_name;

title: Students who have never taken an exam
description: Prikaži ime, prezime, broj indeksa i godinu upisa studenata koji NISU izašli ni na jedan ispit.
hint: Koristi WHERE id NOT IN (SELECT DISTINCT student_id FROM exams)
solution:
SELECT first_name, last_name, index_number, enrollment_year
FROM students
WHERE id NOT IN (
  SELECT DISTINCT student_id
  FROM exams
)
ORDER BY last_name;

title: Faculties with at least one department
description: Prikaži naziv i grad svih fakulteta koji imaju bar jedan departman u tabeli departments.
hint: Koristi WHERE id IN (SELECT DISTINCT faculty_id FROM departments)
solution:
SELECT name, city
FROM faculties
WHERE id IN (
  SELECT DISTINCT faculty_id
  FROM departments
)
ORDER BY name;

title: Faculty with the most students
description: Prikaži naziv i grad fakulteta koji ima najveći broj studenata. Koristi skalarni subquery.
hint: Skalarni subquery vraća jedan faculty_id: SELECT faculty_id FROM students GROUP BY faculty_id ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 1
solution:
SELECT name, city
FROM faculties
WHERE id = (
  SELECT faculty_id
  FROM students
  GROUP BY faculty_id
  ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC
  LIMIT 1
);

title: Students with any grade above overall average
description: Prikaži ime, prezime i broj indeksa studenata koji imaju bar jednu ocenu višu od proseka svih ispita.
hint: Unutrašnji upit: SELECT student_id FROM exams WHERE grade > (SELECT AVG(grade) FROM exams). Spoljašnji: WHERE id IN (...)

title: Subjects with above-average exam grade
description: Prikaži naziv predmeta čija je prosečna ocena na ispitima veća od ukupnog proseka svih ispita.
hint: Unutrašnji upit grupiše exams po subject_id i koristi HAVING AVG(grade) > (SELECT AVG(grade) FROM exams). Spoljašnji dohvata nazive.
solution:
SELECT name
FROM subjects
WHERE id IN (
  SELECT subject_id
  FROM exams
  GROUP BY subject_id
  HAVING AVG(grade) > (
    SELECT AVG(grade) FROM exams
  )
)
ORDER BY name;

title: Professor(s) with the most assigned subjects
description: Prikaži ime, prezime i titulu profesora koji predaju najveći broj predmeta (može biti više profesora s istim maksimumom).
hint: Unutrašnji subquery pronalazi MAX broj predmeta: SELECT MAX(cnt) FROM (SELECT COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM professor_subjects GROUP BY professor_id) t. Spoljašnji filtrira profesore koji dostiže taj max.
solution:
SELECT first_name, last_name, title
FROM professors
WHERE id IN (
  SELECT professor_id
  FROM professor_subjects
  GROUP BY professor_id
  HAVING COUNT(*) = (
    SELECT MAX(cnt)
    FROM (
      SELECT COUNT(*) AS cnt
      FROM professor_subjects
      GROUP BY professor_id
    ) t
  )
)
ORDER BY last_name;

title: Subjects with more exams than average
description: Prikaži naziv predmeta koji su imali više ispita od prosečnog broja ispita po predmetu.
hint: Unutrašnji upit računa prosek: SELECT AVG(exam_count) FROM (SELECT subject_id, COUNT(*) AS exam_count FROM exams GROUP BY subject_id) t. Spoljašnji filtrira predmete koji prelaze taj prosek.
solution:
SELECT name
FROM subjects
WHERE id IN (
  SELECT subject_id
  FROM exams
  GROUP BY subject_id
  HAVING COUNT(*) > (
    SELECT AVG(exam_count)
    FROM (
      SELECT subject_id, COUNT(*) AS exam_count
      FROM exams
      GROUP BY subject_id
    ) t
  )
)
ORDER BY name;

title: Students above their department average
description: Prikaži ime, prezime i department_id studenata čija je lična prosečna ocena veća od proseka svih studenata istog departmana. Uključi samo studente sa departmanom.
hint: Correlated subquery: za svakog studenta iz spoljašnjeg upita, unutrašnji upit računa prosek njihovog departmana. Korelacija: WHERE s2.department_id = s.department_id
solution:
SELECT s.first_name, s.last_name, s.department_id
FROM students s
WHERE s.department_id IS NOT NULL
  AND (
    SELECT AVG(e.grade)
    FROM exams e
    WHERE e.student_id = s.id
  ) > (
    SELECT AVG(e2.grade)
    FROM exams e2
    INNER JOIN students s2 ON e2.student_id = s2.id
    WHERE s2.department_id = s.department_id
  )
ORDER BY s.last_name;

title: Exams above subject average grade
description: Prikaži student_id, subject_id, ocenu i prosečnu ocenu tog predmeta za svaki ispit gdje je ocena veća od proseka ocena istog predmeta.
hint: Correlated subquery u WHERE: grade > (SELECT AVG(e2.grade) FROM exams e2 WHERE e2.subject_id = e.subject_id). Možeš i dodati computed kolonu sa prosekom koristeći isti subquery u SELECT.
solution:
SELECT
  e.student_id,
  e.subject_id,
  e.grade,
  ROUND((
    SELECT AVG(e2.grade)
    FROM exams e2
    WHERE e2.subject_id = e.subject_id
  ), 2) AS subject_avg
FROM exams e
WHERE e.grade > (
  SELECT AVG(e2.grade)
  FROM exams e2
  WHERE e2.subject_id = e.subject_id
)
ORDER BY e.subject_id, e.grade DESC;

title: Professors who have graded at least one exam
description: Koristeći EXISTS, pronađi profesore koji su ocijenili bar jedan ispit u tabeli exams.
hint: Correlated EXISTS: WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM exams e WHERE e.professor_id = p.id)
solution:
SELECT first_name, last_name, title
FROM professors p
WHERE EXISTS (
  SELECT 1
  FROM exams e
  WHERE e.professor_id = p.id
)
ORDER BY last_name;

title: Departments with above-average student grades
description: Prikaži naziv departmana čiji studenti imaju prosečnu ocenu na ispitima višu od ukupnog proseka svih ispita.
hint: Unutrašnji upit grupiše studente po department_id i koristi HAVING AVG(e.grade) > (SELECT AVG(grade) FROM exams). Spoljašnji dohvata nazive departmana.
solution:
SELECT d.name AS department_name
FROM departments d
WHERE d.id IN (
  SELECT s.department_id
  FROM students s
  INNER JOIN exams e ON s.id = e.student_id
  GROUP BY s.department_id
  HAVING AVG(e.grade) > (
    SELECT AVG(grade) FROM exams
  )
)
ORDER BY d.name;

title: Basic passed/failed status
description: Za svaki ispit prikaži student_id, subject_id, ocenu i novu kolonu passed_status sa vrednostima 'Položen' ili 'Pao'. Sortiraj po student_id, pa po subject_id.
hint: Koristi CASE WHEN passed THEN 'Položen' ELSE 'Pao' END AS passed_status
solution:
SELECT
  student_id,
  subject_id,
  grade,
  CASE WHEN passed THEN 'Položen' ELSE 'Pao' END AS passed_status
FROM exams
ORDER BY student_id, subject_id;

title: Grade classification label
description: Za svaki ispit prikaži ocenu i oznaku: ocena 10 = 'Odličan (10)', ocene 8-9 = 'Vrlodobar', ocene 6-7 = 'Položen', ocena 5 = 'Pao'. Sortiraj po oceni opadajuće.
hint: CASE WHEN evaluira uslove redom — stavi najspecifičniji uslov prvi. Koristi grade = 10, grade >= 8, grade >= 6, ELSE za ostalo.
solution:
SELECT
  student_id,
  subject_id,
  grade,
  CASE
    WHEN grade = 10 THEN 'Odličan (10)'
    WHEN grade >= 8  THEN 'Vrlodobar'
    WHEN grade >= 6  THEN 'Položen'
    ELSE                  'Pao'
  END AS grade_label
FROM exams
ORDER BY grade DESC;

title: ECTS difficulty category
description: Za svaki predmet prikaži naziv, broj ECTS bodova i kategoriju: ects >= 8 = 'Zahtjevan', ects >= 5 = 'Srednji', ostalo = 'Lagan'. Sortiraj po ECTS opadajuće.
hint: CASE WHEN ects >= 8 THEN ... WHEN ects >= 5 THEN ... ELSE ... END AS ects_category
solution:
SELECT
  name,
  ects,
  CASE
    WHEN ects >= 8 THEN 'Zahtjevan'
    WHEN ects >= 5 THEN 'Srednji'
    ELSE                'Lagan'
  END AS ects_category
FROM subjects
ORDER BY ects DESC, name;

title: Enrollment year label
description: Za svakog studenta prikaži ime, prezime, godinu upisa i oznaku generacije: 2023 = 'Prva godina', 2022 = 'Druga godina', 2021 = 'Treća godina', ostalo = 'Starija generacija'. Sortiraj po godini upisa opadajuće, pa po prezimenu.
hint: Koristi CASE enrollment_year WHEN 2023 THEN ... WHEN 2022 THEN ... END za simple CASE varijantu.
solution:
SELECT
  first_name,
  last_name,
  enrollment_year,
  CASE enrollment_year
    WHEN 2023 THEN 'Prva godina'
    WHEN 2022 THEN 'Druga godina'
    WHEN 2021 THEN 'Treća godina'
    ELSE           'Starija generacija'
  END AS year_label
FROM students
ORDER BY enrollment_year DESC, last_name;

title: Passed and failed count per subject
description: Za svaki predmet (subject_id) prikaži ukupan broj ispita, broj položenih i broj nepoloženih. Koristi CASE WHEN unutar COUNT. Sortiraj po subject_id.
hint: COUNT(CASE WHEN passed THEN 1 END) broji samo redove gdje je uslov true — NULL vrednosti se ne broje. Alternativa: COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE passed).
solution:
SELECT
  subject_id,
  COUNT(*)                              AS total,
  COUNT(CASE WHEN passed THEN 1 END)    AS passed_count,
  COUNT(CASE WHEN NOT passed THEN 1 END) AS failed_count
FROM exams
GROUP BY subject_id
ORDER BY subject_id;

title: ECTS sum by category per faculty
description: Za svaki fakultet (faculty_id) prikaži sumu ECTS bodova za zahtjevne predmete (ects >= 8), srednje (5-7) i lagane (do 4). Sortiraj po faculty_id.
hint: Koristi SUM(CASE WHEN ects >= 8 THEN ects ELSE 0 END) za uvjetno sabiranje unutar GROUP BY.
solution:
SELECT
  faculty_id,
  SUM(CASE WHEN ects >= 8            THEN ects ELSE 0 END) AS high_ects,
  SUM(CASE WHEN ects BETWEEN 5 AND 7 THEN ects ELSE 0 END) AS medium_ects,
  SUM(CASE WHEN ects <= 4            THEN ects ELSE 0 END) AS low_ects
FROM subjects
GROUP BY faculty_id
ORDER BY faculty_id;

title: Pass rate per subject with CASE WHEN
description: Za svaki predmet prikaži subject_id, ukupan broj ispita i procenat položenosti zaokružen na jednu decimalu. Koristi SUM sa CASE WHEN. Sortiraj po procentu položenosti opadajuće.
hint: SUM(CASE WHEN passed THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*) * 100.0 daje procenat. Množi sa 100.0 (ne 100) da dobiješ decimalni rezultat.
solution:
SELECT
  subject_id,
  COUNT(*) AS total_attempts,
  ROUND(
    100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN passed THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*),
    1
  ) AS pass_rate_pct
FROM exams
GROUP BY subject_id
ORDER BY pass_rate_pct DESC;

title: Professor title group
description: Za svakog profesora prikaži ime, prezime, titulu i grupu: profesori s titulom koja sadrži 'profesor' = 'Profesor', docenti = 'Docent', ostali = 'Saradnik'. Sortiraj po grupi, pa po prezimenu.
hint: Koristi CASE WHEN title LIKE '%profesor%' THEN ... WHEN title = 'docent' THEN ... ELSE ... END
solution:
SELECT
  first_name,
  last_name,
  title,
  CASE
    WHEN title LIKE '%profesor%' THEN 'Profesor'
    WHEN title = 'docent'        THEN 'Docent'
    ELSE                              'Saradnik'
  END AS title_group
FROM professors
ORDER BY title_group, last_name;

title: Classify subjects by average exam grade
description: Za svaki predmet koji je bio na ispitu prikaži naziv, prosečnu ocenu i klasifikaciju: avg >= 8 = 'Lak predmet', avg >= 6.5 = 'Srednji', ispod = 'Težak predmet'. Sortiraj po prosečnoj oceni opadajuće.
hint: JOIN subjects i exams, GROUP BY subject, pa CASE WHEN AVG(grade) >= 8 ... u SELECT-u. AVG se izračunava nad grupom, pa se može koristiti u CASE.
solution:
SELECT
  sub.name AS subject_name,
  ROUND(AVG(e.grade), 2) AS avg_grade,
  CASE
    WHEN AVG(e.grade) >= 8.0 THEN 'Lak predmet'
    WHEN AVG(e.grade) >= 6.5 THEN 'Srednji'
    ELSE                          'Težak predmet'
  END AS difficulty_label
FROM subjects sub
INNER JOIN exams e ON sub.id = e.subject_id
GROUP BY sub.id, sub.name
ORDER BY avg_grade DESC;

title: Classify students by average grade
description: Za svakog studenta koji ima barem jedan ispit prikaži ime, prezime, prosečnu ocenu i performans: avg >= 9 = 'Odličan', avg >= 7.5 = 'Vrlo dobar', avg >= 6.5 = 'Dobar', ispod = 'Dovoljan'. Sortiraj po prosečnoj oceni opadajuće.
hint: JOIN students i exams, GROUP BY student, pa CASE WHEN u SELECT-u nad AVG(grade).
solution:
SELECT
  s.first_name,
  s.last_name,
  ROUND(AVG(e.grade), 2) AS avg_grade,
  CASE
    WHEN AVG(e.grade) >= 9.0 THEN 'Odličan'
    WHEN AVG(e.grade) >= 7.5 THEN 'Vrlo dobar'
    WHEN AVG(e.grade) >= 6.5 THEN 'Dobar'
    ELSE                          'Dovoljan'
  END AS performance
FROM students s
INNER JOIN exams e ON s.id = e.student_id
GROUP BY s.id, s.first_name, s.last_name
ORDER BY avg_grade DESC;

title: Faculty size classification
description: Za svaki fakultet prikaži naziv, broj studenata i veličinu: >= 20 = 'Velik', >= 10 = 'Srednji', ispod = 'Mali'. Uključi i fakultete bez studenata. Sortiraj po broju studenata opadajuće.
hint: LEFT JOIN faculties sa students, GROUP BY faculty, pa CASE WHEN COUNT(s.id) >= 20 ... Koristi COUNT(s.id) da pravilno broji NULL redove iz LEFT JOIN.
solution:
SELECT
  f.name AS faculty_name,
  COUNT(s.id) AS student_count,
  CASE
    WHEN COUNT(s.id) >= 20 THEN 'Velik'
    WHEN COUNT(s.id) >= 10 THEN 'Srednji'
    ELSE                        'Mali'
  END AS size_label
FROM faculties f
LEFT JOIN students s ON f.id = s.faculty_id
GROUP BY f.id, f.name
ORDER BY student_count DESC;

title: Student performance vs overall average
description: Za svakog studenta s ispitima prikaži ime, prezime, njegovu prosečnu ocenu, ukupni prosek svih ispita i poređenje: 'Iznad proseka', 'Na proseku' ili 'Ispod proseka'. Sortiraj po prosečnoj oceni opadajuće.
hint: Skalarni subquery (SELECT AVG(grade) FROM exams) možeš koristiti i u SELECT i u CASE WHEN. Kombinuj GROUP BY sa CASE nad agregatnom vrednošću.
solution:
SELECT
  s.first_name,
  s.last_name,
  ROUND(AVG(e.grade), 2)                   AS student_avg,
  ROUND((SELECT AVG(grade) FROM exams), 2) AS overall_avg,
  CASE
    WHEN AVG(e.grade) > (SELECT AVG(grade) FROM exams) THEN 'Iznad proseka'
    WHEN AVG(e.grade) = (SELECT AVG(grade) FROM exams) THEN 'Na proseku'
    ELSE                                                     'Ispod proseka'
  END AS comparison
FROM students s
INNER JOIN exams e ON s.id = e.student_id
GROUP BY s.id, s.first_name, s.last_name
ORDER BY student_avg DESC;

title: UNION: unique first names
description: Prikaži sve jedinstvene vrijednosti first_name koje se pojavljuju u tabeli students ILI u tabeli professors. Sortiraj abecedno.
hint: UNION automatski uklanja duplikate. Oba SELECT-a moraju vraćati isti broj kolona istog tipa.
solution:
SELECT first_name FROM students
UNION
SELECT first_name FROM professors
ORDER BY first_name;

title: UNION ALL: all first names with duplicates
description: Prikaži SVA imena (first_name) iz tabele students i tabele professors — bez uklanjanja duplikata. Sortiraj abecedno. Uporedi broj redova sa prethodnim UNION zadatkom.
hint: UNION ALL ne uklanja duplikate — brži je od UNION. Rezultat može imati ista ime više puta ako se ono pojavljuje u obje tabele.
solution:
SELECT first_name FROM students
UNION ALL
SELECT first_name FROM professors
ORDER BY first_name;

title: UNION: department IDs from students and professors
description: Prikaži sve jedinstvene department_id vrijednosti koje se koriste kod studenata ili profesora. Isključi NULL vrednosti. Sortiraj rastuće.
hint: Filtriraj NULL u oba SELECT-a sa WHERE department_id IS NOT NULL. UNION uklanja duplikate.
solution:
SELECT department_id FROM students   WHERE department_id IS NOT NULL
UNION
SELECT department_id FROM professors WHERE department_id IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY department_id;

title: INTERSECT: shared department IDs
description: Pronađi department_id vrijednosti koje se pojavljuju KOD STUDENATA I KOD PROFESORA — departmani koji imaju i studente i nastavno osoblje. Sortiraj rastuće.
hint: INTERSECT vraća samo redove koji postoje u OBA rezultata. Filtriraj NULL u oba upita.
solution:
SELECT department_id FROM students   WHERE department_id IS NOT NULL
INTERSECT
SELECT department_id FROM professors WHERE department_id IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY department_id;

title: EXCEPT: professors-only department IDs
description: Pronađi department_id vrijednosti koje koriste profesori, ali ne i studenti — departmani samo s nastavnim osobljem, bez studenata. Sortiraj rastuće.
hint: EXCEPT vraća redove koji su u prvom skupu ali NE i u drugom. Redosled upita je bitan: A EXCEPT B daje 'u A ali ne u B'.
solution:
SELECT department_id FROM professors WHERE department_id IS NOT NULL
EXCEPT
SELECT department_id FROM students   WHERE department_id IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY department_id;

title: INTERSECT: subjects in both exams and professor_subjects
description: Pronađi subject_id vrijednosti koji se pojavljuju I u tabeli exams I u tabeli professor_subjects — predmeti koji su i polagani i dodijeljeni profesorima. Sortiraj rastuće.
hint: INTERSECT radi na skupovima redova. Ovde porede se skupovi subject_id vrednosti iz dve različite tabele.
solution:
SELECT subject_id FROM exams
INTERSECT
SELECT subject_id FROM professor_subjects
ORDER BY subject_id;

title: EXCEPT: subjects assigned to professors but never examined
description: Pronađi subject_id vrijednosti koji se nalaze u professor_subjects ali NISU ni u jednom ispitu — predmeti dodijeljeni profesorima koji još nisu polagani.
hint: A EXCEPT B: subject_id-ovi koji su u professor_subjects ali ne i u exams. Rezultat može biti prazan ako su svi predmeti polagani.
solution:
SELECT subject_id FROM professor_subjects
EXCEPT
SELECT subject_id FROM exams
ORDER BY subject_id;

title: UNION ALL with source type column
description: Napravi objedinjenu listu svih osoba iz baze: prikaži first_name, last_name i izvor ('Student' ili 'Professor'). Uključi sve — i duplikate. Sortiraj po prezimenu, pa po imenu.
hint: Dodaj literal kao treću kolonu: SELECT first_name, last_name, 'Student' AS person_type ... UNION ALL SELECT first_name, last_name, 'Professor' ...
solution:
SELECT first_name, last_name, 'Student'   AS person_type FROM students
UNION ALL
SELECT first_name, last_name, 'Professor' AS person_type FROM professors
ORDER BY last_name, first_name, person_type;

title: EXCEPT: students-only department IDs with ORDER BY
description: Pronađi department_id vrijednosti koje koriste studenti ali NE i profesori. Sortiraj opadajuće. (Ako je rezultat prazan, to znači da profesori pokrivaju sve departmane koje imaju studenti.)
hint: ORDER BY u set operacijama dolazi na kraju cijelog upita i primjenjuje se na kombinirani rezultat.
solution:
SELECT department_id FROM students   WHERE department_id IS NOT NULL
EXCEPT
SELECT department_id FROM professors WHERE department_id IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY department_id DESC;

title: UNION: students with grade 10 and students without any exam
description: Napravi listu studentskih ID-eva koji su dobili ocjenu 10 na barem jednom ispitu (kategorija 'Excellent'), i ID-eve studenata koji nisu polagali ni jedan ispit (kategorija 'No exams'). Sortiraj po kategoriji, pa po student_id.
hint: Prva grana: SELECT DISTINCT student_id, 'Excellent' FROM exams WHERE grade = 10. Druga grana: SELECT id, 'No exams' FROM students WHERE id NOT IN (...). UNION kombinuje.
solution:
SELECT DISTINCT student_id AS id, 'Ocjena 10' AS category
FROM exams
WHERE grade = 10
UNION
SELECT id, 'Bez ispita' AS category
FROM students
WHERE id NOT IN (SELECT DISTINCT student_id FROM exams)
ORDER BY category, id;

title: Basic CTE: filter passed exams
description: Koristeći WITH, definiši CTE nazvan passed_exams koji sadrži samo položene ispite (passed = true). Zatim iz tog CTE-a prikaži sve redove sortirane po oceni opadajuće.
hint: Sintaksa: WITH naziv AS (SELECT ...) SELECT ... FROM naziv ...
solution:
WITH passed_exams AS (
  SELECT student_id, subject_id, grade, exam_date
  FROM exams
  WHERE passed = true
)
SELECT *
FROM passed_exams
ORDER BY grade DESC;

title: CTE: average grade per student
description: Definiši CTE student_averages koji za svakog studenta računa prosečnu ocenu i broj ispita. Zatim taj CTE spoji sa tabelom students da dobiješ ime, prezime, prosek i broj ispita. Sortiraj po proseku opadajuće.
hint: CTE grupiše exams po student_id. Spoljašnji SELECT JOIN-uje CTE sa students tabelom.
solution:
WITH student_averages AS (
  SELECT
    student_id,
    ROUND(AVG(grade), 2) AS avg_grade,
    COUNT(*)             AS exam_count
  FROM exams
  GROUP BY student_id
)
SELECT
  s.first_name,
  s.last_name,
  sa.avg_grade,
  sa.exam_count
FROM student_averages sa
INNER JOIN students s ON sa.student_id = s.id
ORDER BY sa.avg_grade DESC;

title: CTE: exam stats per subject
description: Definiši CTE exam_stats koji za svaki predmet računa broj ispita i prosečnu ocenu. Spoji sa subjects da dobiješ naziv predmeta. Prikaži samo predmete s barem 3 ispita. Sortiraj po proseku opadajuće.
hint: CTE može sadržavati GROUP BY i agregacije. Spoljašnji SELECT filtrira po kolonama iz CTE-a.
solution:
WITH exam_stats AS (
  SELECT
    subject_id,
    COUNT(*)             AS total_exams,
    ROUND(AVG(grade), 2) AS avg_grade
  FROM exams
  GROUP BY subject_id
)
SELECT
  sub.name AS subject_name,
  es.total_exams,
  es.avg_grade
FROM exam_stats es
INNER JOIN subjects sub ON es.subject_id = sub.id
WHERE es.total_exams >= 3
ORDER BY es.avg_grade DESC;

title: CTE: department info with faculty
description: Definiši CTE dept_info koji spaja departments i faculties (naziv departmana + naziv i grad fakulteta). Zatim iz tog CTE-a prikaži studente s njihovim departmanom i fakultetom. Sortiraj po nazivu fakulteta, departmana i prezimenu.
hint: CTE može sadržavati JOIN. Spoljašnji SELECT tada JOIN-uje CTE sa students umjesto da ponovo piše isti JOIN.
solution:
WITH dept_info AS (
  SELECT
    d.id          AS dept_id,
    d.name        AS dept_name,
    f.name        AS faculty_name,
    f.city
  FROM departments d
  INNER JOIN faculties f ON d.faculty_id = f.id
)
SELECT
  s.first_name,
  s.last_name,
  di.dept_name,
  di.faculty_name
FROM students s
INNER JOIN dept_info di ON s.department_id = di.dept_id
ORDER BY di.faculty_name, di.dept_name, s.last_name;

title: Two CTEs: passed count and average grade
description: Definiši dva CTE-a: passed_stats (broj položenih ispita po studentu) i avg_stats (prosečna ocena po studentu). Spoji oba CTE-a sa students i prikaži ime, prezime, broj položenih i prosek. Sortiraj po proseku opadajuće.
hint: Više CTE-ova se odvajaju zarezom: WITH cte1 AS (...), cte2 AS (...) SELECT ...
solution:
WITH passed_stats AS (
  SELECT student_id, COUNT(*) AS passed_count
  FROM exams
  WHERE passed = true
  GROUP BY student_id
),
avg_stats AS (
  SELECT student_id, ROUND(AVG(grade), 2) AS avg_grade
  FROM exams
  GROUP BY student_id
)
SELECT
  s.first_name,
  s.last_name,
  ps.passed_count,
  av.avg_grade
FROM students s
INNER JOIN passed_stats ps ON s.id = ps.student_id
INNER JOIN avg_stats    av ON s.id = av.student_id
ORDER BY av.avg_grade DESC;

title: CTE: subject count per professor
description: Definiši CTE prof_load koji računa broj predmeta po profesoru (iz professor_subjects). Spoji sa professors i prikaži ime, prezime, titulu i broj predmeta. Sortiraj po broju predmeta opadajuće.
hint: CTE enkapsulira logiku brojanja. Spoljašnji SELECT JOIN-uje CTE sa professors za čitljiv finalni upit.
solution:
WITH prof_load AS (
  SELECT professor_id, COUNT(*) AS subject_count
  FROM professor_subjects
  GROUP BY professor_id
)
SELECT
  p.first_name,
  p.last_name,
  p.title,
  pl.subject_count
FROM professors p
INNER JOIN prof_load pl ON p.id = pl.professor_id
ORDER BY pl.subject_count DESC, p.last_name;

title: CTE: subjects with below-average passing rate
description: Definiši CTE subject_pass_rate koji računa procenat položenosti po predmetu. Prikaži samo predmete čiji je procenat položenosti ispod 70%. Sortiraj po procentu rastuće.
hint: CTE računa pass_rate_pct. Spoljašnji SELECT filtrira WHERE pass_rate_pct < 70 i JOIN-uje sa subjects za naziv.
solution:
WITH subject_pass_rate AS (
  SELECT
    subject_id,
    ROUND(
      100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN passed THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*),
      1
    ) AS pass_rate_pct
  FROM exams
  GROUP BY subject_id
)
SELECT
  sub.name AS subject_name,
  spr.pass_rate_pct
FROM subject_pass_rate spr
INNER JOIN subjects sub ON spr.subject_id = sub.id
WHERE spr.pass_rate_pct < 70
ORDER BY spr.pass_rate_pct ASC;

title: CTE with HAVING: high-performing departments
description: Definiši CTE dept_grades koji računa prosečnu ocenu studenata po departmanu (koristeći JOIN students → exams). Prikaži samo departmane gdje je prosek veći od 7.0. Spoji sa departments za nazive. Sortiraj po proseku opadajuće.
hint: CTE može imati HAVING za filtriranje agregatnih rezultata. Spoljašnji SELECT JOIN-uje CTE rezultat sa departments. Threshold: HAVING AVG(e.grade) > 7.0
solution:
WITH dept_grades AS (
  SELECT
    s.department_id,
    ROUND(AVG(e.grade), 2) AS avg_grade
  FROM students s
  INNER JOIN exams e ON s.id = e.student_id
  WHERE s.department_id IS NOT NULL
  GROUP BY s.department_id
  HAVING AVG(e.grade) > 7.0
)
SELECT
  d.name AS department_name,
  dg.avg_grade
FROM dept_grades dg
INNER JOIN departments d ON dg.department_id = d.id
ORDER BY dg.avg_grade DESC;

title: Two CTEs: faculty student count and exam stats
description: Definiši dva CTE-a: faculty_students (broj studenata po fakultetu) i faculty_exams (prosečna ocena i broj ispita po fakultetu, kroz students). Spoji oba s faculties i prikaži kompletan pregled. Sortiraj po prosečnoj oceni opadajuće.
hint: Drugi CTE može da koristi JOIN unutar sebe. faculty_exams treba JOIN students → exams, pa GROUP BY faculty_id.
solution:
WITH faculty_students AS (
  SELECT faculty_id, COUNT(*) AS student_count
  FROM students
  GROUP BY faculty_id
),
faculty_exams AS (
  SELECT
    s.faculty_id,
    ROUND(AVG(e.grade), 2) AS avg_grade,
    COUNT(*)               AS total_exams
  FROM students s
  INNER JOIN exams e ON s.id = e.student_id
  GROUP BY s.faculty_id
)
SELECT
  f.name         AS faculty_name,
  fs.student_count,
  fe.avg_grade,
  fe.total_exams
FROM faculties f
INNER JOIN faculty_students fs ON f.id = fs.faculty_id
LEFT  JOIN faculty_exams    fe ON f.id = fe.faculty_id
ORDER BY fe.avg_grade DESC NULLS LAST;

title: Three CTEs: overall avg → student avg → above average
description: Definiši tri CTE-a: overall_avg (ukupni prosek svih ispita), student_avg (prosek po studentu), above_avg (studenti iznad ukupnog proseka). Finalni SELECT prikazuje ime, prezime i prosek studenata iznad prosjeka. Sortiraj opadajuće.
hint: Kasniji CTE može referencirati raniji: above_avg može da koristi student_avg i overall_avg u WHERE klauzuli.
solution:
WITH overall_avg AS (
  SELECT AVG(grade) AS avg_grade
  FROM exams
),
student_avg AS (
  SELECT student_id, AVG(grade) AS avg_grade
  FROM exams
  GROUP BY student_id
),
above_avg AS (
  SELECT sa.student_id, ROUND(sa.avg_grade, 2) AS student_avg
  FROM student_avg sa, overall_avg oa
  WHERE sa.avg_grade > oa.avg_grade
)
SELECT
  s.first_name,
  s.last_name,
  aa.student_avg
FROM above_avg aa
INNER JOIN students s ON aa.student_id = s.id
ORDER BY aa.student_avg DESC;

title: CTE: top student per faculty
description: Koristeći CTE-ove, pronađi studenta s najvišom prosečnom ocenom po fakultetu. Prikaži ime, prezime, naziv fakulteta i prosečnu ocenu. (Ako više studenata dijeli maksimum, prikaži sve.)
hint: CTE student_avg računa prosek po studentu. CTE faculty_best uzima MAX(avg_grade) po faculty_id. Finalni SELECT JOIN-uje da filtrira studente na maksimumu.
solution:
WITH student_avg AS (
  SELECT
    s.id         AS student_id,
    s.first_name,
    s.last_name,
    s.faculty_id,
    ROUND(AVG(e.grade), 2) AS avg_grade
  FROM students s
  INNER JOIN exams e ON s.id = e.student_id
  GROUP BY s.id, s.first_name, s.last_name, s.faculty_id
),
faculty_best AS (
  SELECT faculty_id, MAX(avg_grade) AS best_avg
  FROM student_avg
  GROUP BY faculty_id
)
SELECT
  sa.first_name,
  sa.last_name,
  f.name AS faculty_name,
  sa.avg_grade
FROM student_avg sa
INNER JOIN faculty_best fb
  ON sa.faculty_id = fb.faculty_id
  AND sa.avg_grade = fb.best_avg
INNER JOIN faculties f ON sa.faculty_id = f.id
ORDER BY f.name, sa.last_name;

title: Multi-CTE: exam stats with difficulty label
description: Definiši dva CTE-a: exam_stats (broj ispita, broj položenih, prosečna ocena po predmetu) i subject_difficulty (CASE WHEN klasifikacija na osnovu proseka: Easy/Medium/Hard). Finalni SELECT prikazuje naziv predmeta, statistiku i klasifikaciju. Sortiraj po proseku.
hint: Drugi CTE subject_difficulty referencira prvi CTE exam_stats. Koristi CASE WHEN nad avg_grade kolonom iz prvog CTE-a.
solution:
WITH exam_stats AS (
  SELECT
    subject_id,
    COUNT(*)                              AS total_attempts,
    COUNT(CASE WHEN passed THEN 1 END)    AS passed_count,
    ROUND(AVG(grade), 2)                  AS avg_grade
  FROM exams
  GROUP BY subject_id
),
subject_difficulty AS (
  SELECT
    subject_id,
    avg_grade,
    CASE
      WHEN avg_grade >= 8.0 THEN 'Easy'
      WHEN avg_grade >= 6.5 THEN 'Medium'
      ELSE                       'Hard'
    END AS difficulty_label
  FROM exam_stats
)
SELECT
  sub.name           AS subject_name,
  es.total_attempts,
  es.passed_count,
  es.avg_grade,
  sd.difficulty_label
FROM exam_stats es
INNER JOIN subject_difficulty sd ON es.subject_id = sd.subject_id
INNER JOIN subjects           sub ON es.subject_id = sub.id
ORDER BY es.avg_grade ASC;

title: Overall average alongside each exam
description: Za svaki ispit prikaži student_id, subject_id, ocenu i ukupnu prosečnu ocenu svih ispita u istom redu. Koristi AVG() OVER() bez PARTITION BY.
hint: AVG(grade) OVER() — prazna OVER() klauzula znači: jedan prozor koji obuhvata sve redove.
solution:
SELECT
  student_id,
  subject_id,
  grade,
  ROUND(AVG(grade) OVER(), 2) AS overall_avg
FROM exams
ORDER BY student_id, subject_id;

title: Subject average alongside each exam
description: Za svaki ispit prikaži student_id, subject_id, ocenu i prosečnu ocenu za taj predmet. Koristi AVG() OVER(PARTITION BY subject_id).
hint: PARTITION BY subject_id dijeli redove u grupe po predmetu. AVG se računa unutar svake grupe, ali redovi se ne agregiraju — ostaje isti broj redova.
solution:
SELECT
  student_id,
  subject_id,
  grade,
  ROUND(AVG(grade) OVER(PARTITION BY subject_id), 2) AS subject_avg
FROM exams
ORDER BY subject_id, grade DESC;

title: Exam count per student on each row
description: Za svaki ispit prikaži student_id, subject_id, ocenu i ukupan broj ispita tog studenta — bez GROUP BY, u svakom redu.
hint: COUNT(*) OVER(PARTITION BY student_id) — broji sve redove unutar istog student_id.
solution:
SELECT
  student_id,
  subject_id,
  grade,
  COUNT(*) OVER(PARTITION BY student_id) AS student_exam_count
FROM exams
ORDER BY student_id, subject_id;

title: Student average alongside each exam
description: Za svaki ispit prikaži student_id, subject_id, ocenu i prosečnu ocenu tog studenta. Upotrijebi AVG() OVER(PARTITION BY student_id) da dobiješ prosek bez GROUP BY.
hint: PARTITION BY student_id dijeli prozor po studentu. Svaki red zadržava prosek svog studenta.
solution:
SELECT
  student_id,
  subject_id,
  grade,
  ROUND(AVG(grade) OVER(PARTITION BY student_id), 2) AS student_avg
FROM exams
ORDER BY student_id, subject_id;

title: Rank exams by grade
description: Za svaki ispit prikaži student_id, subject_id, ocenu i rang ocene među svim ispitima — od najveće ka najmanjoj. Ispiti s istom ocenom dobijaju isti rang (skok u sledećem rangu).
hint: RANK() OVER(ORDER BY grade DESC) — isti rang za iste ocene, zatim skok (npr. 1,1,3). Sortiraj rezultat po grade_rank.
solution:
SELECT
  student_id,
  subject_id,
  grade,
  RANK() OVER(ORDER BY grade DESC) AS grade_rank
FROM exams
ORDER BY grade_rank, student_id;

title: RANK vs DENSE_RANK: spot the difference
description: Za prvih 20 ispita sortiranih po oceni opadajuće prikaži ocenu, RANK i DENSE_RANK. Uočiti razliku: RANK preskače brojeve nakon duplikata, DENSE_RANK ne preskače.
hint: RANK(): 1,1,3,4... — preskače 2. DENSE_RANK(): 1,1,2,3... — bez preskakanja. Oba koriste isti OVER(ORDER BY grade DESC).
solution:
SELECT
  student_id,
  subject_id,
  grade,
  RANK()       OVER(ORDER BY grade DESC) AS rnk,
  DENSE_RANK() OVER(ORDER BY grade DESC) AS dense_rnk
FROM exams
ORDER BY grade DESC, student_id
LIMIT 20;

title: Row number per student (exam sequence)
description: Za svaki ispit prikaži student_id, subject_id, datum ispita, ocenu i redni broj ispita unutar tog studenta — sortiran po datumu ispita. Koristi ROW_NUMBER().
hint: ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY student_id ORDER BY exam_date) — svaki student dobija sopstveni niz 1, 2, 3...
solution:
SELECT
  student_id,
  subject_id,
  exam_date,
  grade,
  ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY student_id ORDER BY exam_date) AS exam_seq
FROM exams
ORDER BY student_id, exam_seq;

title: Rank students by average grade
description: Izračunaj prosečnu ocenu po studentu i rangiraj studente od najboljeg ka najlošijem. Prikaži ime, prezime, prosek i rang. Koristi CTE za agregaciju pa RANK() za rangiranje.
hint: Najčešći pattern: CTE agregira (GROUP BY), spoljašnji SELECT primjenjuje RANK() OVER(ORDER BY avg_grade DESC) na taj rezultat.
solution:
WITH student_avg AS (
  SELECT
    student_id,
    ROUND(AVG(grade), 2) AS avg_grade,
    COUNT(*)             AS exam_count
  FROM exams
  GROUP BY student_id
)
SELECT
  s.first_name,
  s.last_name,
  sa.avg_grade,
  sa.exam_count,
  RANK() OVER(ORDER BY sa.avg_grade DESC) AS grade_rank
FROM student_avg sa
INNER JOIN students s ON sa.student_id = s.id
ORDER BY grade_rank, s.last_name;

title: Rank subjects by average grade
description: Izračunaj prosečnu ocenu i broj pokušaja po predmetu, pa rangiraj predmete od najlakšeg (visok prosek) ka najtežem. Prikaži naziv predmeta, prosek, broj pokušaja i rang.
hint: CTE računa avg i count po subject_id. Spoljašnji SELECT JOIN-uje sa subjects i primjenjuje RANK() OVER(ORDER BY avg_grade DESC).
solution:
WITH subject_avg AS (
  SELECT
    subject_id,
    ROUND(AVG(grade), 2) AS avg_grade,
    COUNT(*)             AS attempts
  FROM exams
  GROUP BY subject_id
)
SELECT
  sub.name AS subject_name,
  sa.avg_grade,
  sa.attempts,
  RANK() OVER(ORDER BY sa.avg_grade DESC) AS easiness_rank
FROM subject_avg sa
INNER JOIN subjects sub ON sa.subject_id = sub.id
ORDER BY easiness_rank;

title: Rank students within their department
description: Za svakog studenta s departmanom izračunaj prosečnu ocenu i rangiraj ga unutar departmana. Prikaži ime, prezime, department_id, prosek i rang u departmanu.
hint: PARTITION BY department_id u RANK() OVER(...) znači: nezavisno rangiranje unutar svakog departmana. Koristi CTE za proseke pa RANK() sa PARTITION BY.
solution:
WITH student_avg AS (
  SELECT
    s.id           AS student_id,
    s.first_name,
    s.last_name,
    s.department_id,
    ROUND(AVG(e.grade), 2) AS avg_grade
  FROM students s
  INNER JOIN exams e ON s.id = e.student_id
  WHERE s.department_id IS NOT NULL
  GROUP BY s.id, s.first_name, s.last_name, s.department_id
)
SELECT
  first_name,
  last_name,
  department_id,
  avg_grade,
  RANK() OVER(PARTITION BY department_id ORDER BY avg_grade DESC) AS dept_rank
FROM student_avg
ORDER BY department_id, dept_rank;

title: Previous exam grade per student (LAG)
description: Za svaki ispit prikaži student_id, datum, ocenu i ocenu s prethodnog ispita istog studenta (sortiranu po datumu). Za prvi ispit prethodna ocena treba da bude NULL.
hint: LAG(grade) OVER(PARTITION BY student_id ORDER BY exam_date) vraća vrijednost iz prethodnog reda unutar particije. Za prvi red nema prethodnog — rezultat je NULL.
solution:
SELECT
  student_id,
  subject_id,
  exam_date,
  grade,
  LAG(grade) OVER(PARTITION BY student_id ORDER BY exam_date) AS prev_grade
FROM exams
ORDER BY student_id, exam_date;

title: Next exam grade per student (LEAD)
description: Za svaki ispit prikaži student_id, datum, ocenu i ocenu s narednog ispita istog studenta. Za posljednji ispit naredna ocena treba da bude NULL.
hint: LEAD(grade) OVER(PARTITION BY student_id ORDER BY exam_date) vraća vrijednost iz sljedećeg reda. Za posljednji red u particiji rezultat je NULL.
solution:
SELECT
  student_id,
  subject_id,
  exam_date,
  grade,
  LEAD(grade) OVER(PARTITION BY student_id ORDER BY exam_date) AS next_grade
FROM exams
ORDER BY student_id, exam_date;

title: Grade difference from previous exam
description: Za svaki ispit prikaži student_id, datum, ocenu, prethodnu ocenu i razliku (grade - prev_grade). Pozitivna razlika znači poboljšanje, negativna pad. Za prvi ispit razlika je NULL.
hint: Izračunaj LAG(grade) OVER(...) pa od grade oduzmi taj rezultat. Možeš koristiti istu window funkciju dva puta ili WINDOW klauzulu za čitkost.
solution:
SELECT
  student_id,
  subject_id,
  exam_date,
  grade,
  LAG(grade) OVER(PARTITION BY student_id ORDER BY exam_date)             AS prev_grade,
  grade - LAG(grade) OVER(PARTITION BY student_id ORDER BY exam_date)    AS grade_diff
FROM exams
ORDER BY student_id, exam_date;

title: Running exam count per student
description: Za svaki ispit prikaži student_id, datum, ocenu i kumulativni broj ispita tog studenta do tog trenutka (uključujući trenutni). Koristi COUNT() OVER() s ORDER BY.
hint: COUNT(*) OVER(PARTITION BY student_id ORDER BY exam_date) — kad ima ORDER BY, podrazumijevani okvir je RANGE UNBOUNDED PRECEDING TO CURRENT ROW, što daje kumulativni count.
solution:
SELECT
  student_id,
  subject_id,
  exam_date,
  grade,
  COUNT(*) OVER(
    PARTITION BY student_id
    ORDER BY exam_date
  ) AS running_exam_count
FROM exams
ORDER BY student_id, exam_date;

title: Running average grade per student
description: Za svaki ispit prikaži student_id, datum, ocenu i kumulativni prosek ocena tog studenta do tog ispita uključujući trenutni. Koristi AVG() OVER() s eksplicitnim ROWS okvirom.
hint: AVG(grade) OVER(PARTITION BY student_id ORDER BY exam_date ROWS BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) — eksplicitni ROWS okvir čini namjeru jasnom.
solution:
SELECT
  student_id,
  subject_id,
  exam_date,
  grade,
  ROUND(
    AVG(grade) OVER(
      PARTITION BY student_id
      ORDER BY exam_date
      ROWS BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW
    ), 2
  ) AS running_avg
FROM exams
ORDER BY student_id, exam_date;

title: Filter exams by year
description: Prikaži sve ispite koji su se desili 2023. godine. Prikaži student_id, subject_id, ocenu i datum. Sortiraj po datumu.
hint: Koristi EXTRACT(YEAR FROM exam_date) = 2023 u WHERE klauzuli.
solution:
SELECT student_id, subject_id, grade, exam_date
FROM exams
WHERE EXTRACT(YEAR FROM exam_date) = 2023
ORDER BY exam_date;

title: Extract year and month from exam date
description: Za svaki ispit prikaži ocenu, datum i godinu i mesec ispita kao posebne numeričke kolone. Sortiraj po datumu.
hint: EXTRACT(YEAR FROM exam_date) AS exam_year, EXTRACT(MONTH FROM exam_date) AS exam_month — EXTRACT vraća numeričku vrednost.
solution:
SELECT
  student_id,
  subject_id,
  grade,
  exam_date,
  EXTRACT(YEAR  FROM exam_date)::INT AS exam_year,
  EXTRACT(MONTH FROM exam_date)::INT AS exam_month
FROM exams
ORDER BY exam_date;

title: Earliest and latest exam dates
description: Prikaži najraniji datum ispita, najkasniji datum ispita i razliku u danima između njih.
hint: MIN(exam_date) i MAX(exam_date) su agregatne funkcije. Oduzimanje dvaju DATE vrednosti u PostgreSQL-u vraća INTEGER — broj dana.
solution:
SELECT
  MIN(exam_date)                  AS earliest_exam,
  MAX(exam_date)                  AS latest_exam,
  MAX(exam_date) - MIN(exam_date) AS days_span
FROM exams;

title: Exam count and average grade per year
description: Za svaku godinu u kojoj su se desili ispiti prikaži godinu, broj ispita i prosečnu ocenu. Sortiraj po godini.
hint: GROUP BY EXTRACT(YEAR FROM exam_date). EXTRACT vraća float8 — možeš ga kastovati u INT sa ::INT.
solution:
SELECT
  EXTRACT(YEAR FROM exam_date)::INT AS exam_year,
  COUNT(*)                          AS exam_count,
  ROUND(AVG(grade), 2)              AS avg_grade
FROM exams
GROUP BY EXTRACT(YEAR FROM exam_date)
ORDER BY exam_year;

title: Exam count and average grade per month
description: Za svaki mesec koji se pojavljuje u podacima prikaži broj meseca, broj ispita i prosečnu ocenu. Sortiraj po mesecu.
hint: GROUP BY EXTRACT(MONTH FROM exam_date). Isti mesec iz različitih godina tretira se zajedno.
solution:
SELECT
  EXTRACT(MONTH FROM exam_date)::INT AS exam_month,
  COUNT(*)                           AS exam_count,
  ROUND(AVG(grade), 2)               AS avg_grade
FROM exams
GROUP BY EXTRACT(MONTH FROM exam_date)
ORDER BY exam_month;

title: Format exam date with TO_CHAR
description: Za prvih 10 ispita (sortiranih po datumu) prikaži datum u tri formata: 'DD.MM.YYYY.', 'Month YYYY' i dan u godini ('DDD'). Koristi TO_CHAR.
hint: TO_CHAR(exam_date, 'format_string') pretvara datum u tekst prema zadatom formatu. Svaki format koristi drugi format string.
solution:
SELECT
  student_id,
  subject_id,
  grade,
  exam_date,
  TO_CHAR(exam_date, 'DD.MM.YYYY.') AS date_dmy,
  TO_CHAR(exam_date, 'Month YYYY')  AS month_year,
  TO_CHAR(exam_date, 'DDD')         AS day_of_year
FROM exams
ORDER BY exam_date
LIMIT 10;

title: Group exams by month using DATE_TRUNC
description: Koristeći DATE_TRUNC, grupiši ispite po godini i mesecu. Prikaži mesec kao datum prvog dana tog meseca, broj ispita i prosečnu ocenu. Sortiraj hronološki.
hint: DATE_TRUNC('month', exam_date) skraćuje datum na prvi dan tog meseca — idealno za grupovanje po periodu. Dodaj ::DATE za čitljivi prikaz.
solution:
SELECT
  DATE_TRUNC('month', exam_date)::DATE AS exam_month,
  COUNT(*)                             AS exam_count,
  ROUND(AVG(grade), 2)                 AS avg_grade
FROM exams
GROUP BY DATE_TRUNC('month', exam_date)
ORDER BY exam_month;

title: Classify exams by academic exam period
description: Za svaki godinu-mesec kombiniraj EXTRACT i CASE WHEN da odrediš ispitni rok: mesec 1 = 'Januarski rok', mesec 6 = 'Junski rok', mesec 9 = 'Septembarski rok'. Prikaži rok, broj ispita i prosečnu ocenu.
hint: Grupiši po DATE_TRUNC('month', exam_date) a u SELECT dodaj CASE EXTRACT(MONTH FROM ...) za labelu roka.
solution:
SELECT
  DATE_TRUNC('month', exam_date)::DATE AS period_start,
  CASE EXTRACT(MONTH FROM DATE_TRUNC('month', exam_date))::INT
    WHEN 1 THEN 'Januarski rok'
    WHEN 6 THEN 'Junski rok'
    WHEN 9 THEN 'Septembarski rok'
    ELSE        'Ostali period'
  END AS exam_period,
  COUNT(*)             AS exam_count,
  ROUND(AVG(grade), 2) AS avg_grade
FROM exams
GROUP BY DATE_TRUNC('month', exam_date)
ORDER BY period_start;

title: Days between exams per student (LAG on date)
description: Za svakog studenta prikaži svaki ispit, datum prethodnog ispita (LAG) i broj dana između njih. Za prvi ispit prethodnog datuma nema — biće NULL.
hint: LAG(exam_date) OVER(PARTITION BY student_id ORDER BY exam_date) vraća datum prethodnog ispita. Oduzimanje dvaju DATE vrijednosti daje INTEGER (broj dana).
solution:
SELECT
  student_id,
  subject_id,
  exam_date,
  grade,
  LAG(exam_date) OVER(PARTITION BY student_id ORDER BY exam_date) AS prev_exam_date,
  exam_date
    - LAG(exam_date) OVER(PARTITION BY student_id ORDER BY exam_date) AS days_between
FROM exams
ORDER BY student_id, exam_date;

title: First and last exam date per student
description: Za svakog studenta koji ima ispit prikaži ime, prezime, datum prvog ispita, datum posljednjeg ispita i koliko je dana bio aktivan. Sortiraj po broju dana opadajuće.
hint: MIN(e.exam_date) i MAX(e.exam_date) s GROUP BY. Razlika dvaju DATE vrijednosti je INTEGER — broj dana.
solution:
SELECT
  s.first_name,
  s.last_name,
  MIN(e.exam_date)                AS first_exam,
  MAX(e.exam_date)                AS last_exam,
  MAX(e.exam_date) - MIN(e.exam_date) AS days_active
FROM students s
INNER JOIN exams e ON s.id = e.student_id
GROUP BY s.id, s.first_name, s.last_name
ORDER BY days_active DESC, s.last_name;

title: Student full name with CONCAT
description: Prikaži puno ime svakog studenta kao jednu kolonu full_name koristeći funkciju CONCAT. Prikaži i broj indeksa. Sortiraj po prezimenu.
hint: CONCAT(first_name, ' ', last_name) spaja stringove. Razlika od || operatora: CONCAT ignorira NULL vrijednosti.
solution:
SELECT
  CONCAT(first_name, ' ', last_name) AS full_name,
  index_number
FROM students
ORDER BY last_name, first_name;

title: Student full name with year using ||
description: Prikaži puno ime studenta i godinu upisa u formatu 'Ime Prezime (2022)' koristeći || operator. Sortiraj po prezimenu.
hint: || operator: first_name || ' ' || last_name || ' (' || enrollment_year::TEXT || ')'. Za spajanje broja i teksta koristis ::TEXT ili CAST.
solution:
SELECT
  first_name || ' ' || last_name
    || ' (' || enrollment_year::TEXT || ')' AS full_name_with_year
FROM students
ORDER BY last_name, first_name;

title: Faculty names in uppercase
description: Prikaži nazive svih fakulteta ispisane velikim slovima zajedno s gradom.
hint: UPPER(name) pretvara sve karaktere stringa u velika slova.
solution:
SELECT
  UPPER(name) AS faculty_name_upper,
  city
FROM faculties
ORDER BY name;

title: Subject names in lowercase
description: Prikaži nazive svih predmeta ispisane malim slovima zajedno s ECTS bodovima i semestrom.
hint: LOWER(name) pretvara sve karaktere u mala slova.
solution:
SELECT
  LOWER(name) AS subject_name_lower,
  ects,
  semester
FROM subjects
ORDER BY name;

title: Length of subject names
description: Prikaži naziv svakog predmeta i dužinu naziva u karakterima. Sortiraj od najdužeg ka najkraćem.
hint: LENGTH(name) vraća broj karaktera u stringu.
solution:
SELECT
  name,
  LENGTH(name) AS name_length
FROM subjects
ORDER BY name_length DESC, name;

title: TRIM demonstration with padded strings
description: Demonstriraj TRIM: za svaki naziv predmeta prikaži originalni naziv, isti naziv s dodanim razmacima s obje strane i verziju s uklonjenim razmacima. Prikaži i razliku u dužini.
hint: TRIM(string) uklanja vodeće i prateće razmake. Konstruišemo '  ' || name || '  ' da dodamo razmake, pa TRIM da ih uklonimo.
solution:
SELECT
  name,
  '  ' || name || '  '         AS padded,
  TRIM('  ' || name || '  ')   AS trimmed_back,
  LENGTH('  ' || name || '  ')
    - LENGTH(TRIM('  ' || name || '  ')) AS chars_removed
FROM subjects
LIMIT 5;

title: City abbreviation with SUBSTRING
description: Za svaki fakultet prikaži naziv, grad i kraticu grada — prva 3 slova grada. Sortiraj po gradu.
hint: SUBSTRING(city FROM 1 FOR 3) ili ekvivalentno LEFT(city, 3) — oba su validna PostgreSQL sintaksa.
solution:
SELECT
  name,
  city,
  SUBSTRING(city FROM 1 FOR 3) AS city_abbr
FROM faculties
ORDER BY city;

title: Extract username from professor email
description: Za svakog profesora prikaži email, poziciju znaka '@' u email adresi i korisničko ime (dio email adrese prije '@').
hint: POSITION('@' IN email) vraća numeričku poziciju. SUBSTRING(email FROM 1 FOR POSITION('@' IN email) - 1) izvlači dio prije '@'.
solution:
SELECT
  first_name,
  last_name,
  email,
  POSITION('@' IN email)                                 AS at_position,
  SUBSTRING(email FROM 1 FOR POSITION('@' IN email) - 1) AS username
FROM professors
ORDER BY last_name;

title: Find subjects by keyword with ILIKE
description: Pronađi sve predmete čiji naziv sadrži 'analiz' ili 'algebr' (case-insensitive pretraga). Prikaži naziv, ECTS i semestar.
hint: ILIKE vrši pretragu bez razlikovanja velikih i malih slova. Kombiniraj više ILIKE uslova sa OR. % je wildcard za bilo koji niz karaktera.
solution:
SELECT name, ects, semester
FROM subjects
WHERE name ILIKE '%analiz%'
   OR name ILIKE '%algebr%'
ORDER BY name;

title: Professor display name with UPPER title
description: Za svakog profesora kreiraj kolonu display_name u formatu 'TITULA: Ime Prezime', npr. 'DOCENT: Stefan Jovanović'. Sortiraj po tituli, pa po prezimenu.
hint: Kombiniraj UPPER(title), literal string ': ' i konkatenaciju || za ime i prezime.
solution:
SELECT
  title,
  first_name,
  last_name,
  UPPER(title) || ': ' || first_name || ' ' || last_name AS display_name
FROM professors
ORDER BY title, last_name;

title: Faculty label with CONCAT
description: Za svaki fakultet kreiraj oznaku u formatu 'Naziv (Grad) — Univerzitet'. Koristi CONCAT. Sortiraj abecedno po nazivu.
hint: CONCAT(name, ' (', city, ') — ', university_name) — CONCAT može primiti više od 2 argumenta.
solution:
SELECT
  CONCAT(name, ' (', city, ') — ', university_name) AS faculty_label
FROM faculties
ORDER BY name;

title: Categorize subjects by name length
description: Za svaki predmet prikaži naziv, dužinu naziva i kategoriju: 10 ili manje karaktera = 'Kratak', 11-20 = 'Srednji', više od 20 = 'Dugačak'. Sortiraj po dužini opadajuće.
hint: Kombiniraj LENGTH(name) i CASE WHEN. LENGTH vraća integer koji možeš koristiti i u CASE i za ORDER BY.
solution:
SELECT
  name,
  LENGTH(name) AS name_length,
  CASE
    WHEN LENGTH(name) <= 10 THEN 'Kratak'
    WHEN LENGTH(name) <= 20 THEN 'Srednji'
    ELSE                        'Dugačak'
  END AS name_category
FROM subjects
ORDER BY name_length DESC, name;

title: Count rows in students table
description: Koliko studenata ima u bazi? Prikaži ukupan broj, broj s departmanom i broj bez departmana u jednom upitu.
hint: COUNT(*) broji sve redove. COUNT(department_id) broji samo non-NULL vrijednosti. Razlika daje broj NULL-ova.
solution:
SELECT
  COUNT(*)                 AS total_students,
  COUNT(department_id)     AS with_department,
  COUNT(*) - COUNT(department_id) AS without_department
FROM students;
