title: Row count for all tables
description: Prikaži broj redova u svakoj od 7 tabela baze (students, professors, faculties, departments, subjects, exams, professor_subjects). Sortiraj po broju redova opadajuće.
hint: Koristi UNION ALL sa SELECT 'table_name' AS table_name, COUNT(*) AS row_count za svaku tabelu.
solution:
SELECT 'students'           AS table_name, COUNT(*) AS row_count FROM students
UNION ALL
SELECT 'professors',                COUNT(*) FROM professors
UNION ALL
SELECT 'faculties',                 COUNT(*) FROM faculties
UNION ALL
SELECT 'departments',               COUNT(*) FROM departments
UNION ALL
SELECT 'subjects',                  COUNT(*) FROM subjects
UNION ALL
SELECT 'exams',                     COUNT(*) FROM exams
UNION ALL
SELECT 'professor_subjects',        COUNT(*) FROM professor_subjects
ORDER BY row_count DESC;

title: NULL department_id count in students
description: Koliko studenata nema dodijeljen departman? Prikaži ukupan broj studenata, broj s NULL department_id i postotak.
hint: COUNT(*) - COUNT(department_id) daje broj NULL vrednosti jer COUNT ignoriše NULL.
solution:
SELECT
  COUNT(*) AS total,
  COUNT(*) - COUNT(department_id) AS null_dept_count,
  ROUND(
    100.0 * (COUNT(*) - COUNT(department_id)) / COUNT(*),
    1
  ) AS null_pct
FROM students;

title: NULL department_id count in subjects
description: Koliko predmeta nema dodijeljen departman? Prikaži ukupan broj predmeta, broj bez departmana i postotak.
hint: Ista tehnika kao za students: COUNT(*) - COUNT(department_id). Oba NULL broja pokazuju realnu pokrivenost departmanima.
solution:
SELECT
  COUNT(*) AS total_subjects,
  COUNT(*) - COUNT(department_id) AS without_dept,
  ROUND(
    100.0 * (COUNT(*) - COUNT(department_id)) / COUNT(*),
    1
  ) AS pct_without_dept
FROM subjects;

title: COALESCE: students with department or fallback
description: Prikaži sve studente s imenima i nazivom departmana. Za studente bez departmana prikaži 'Bez departmana' umjesto NULL. Koristi COALESCE s LEFT JOIN. Sortiraj po departmanu, pa po prezimenu.
hint: LEFT JOIN zadržava studente bez departmana (daje NULL). COALESCE(d.name, 'Bez departmana') zamjenjuje NULL fallback vrijednošću.
solution:
SELECT
  s.first_name,
  s.last_name,
  COALESCE(d.name, 'Bez departmana') AS department
FROM students s
LEFT JOIN departments d ON s.department_id = d.id
ORDER BY department, s.last_name;

title: Grade distribution
description: Prikaži distribuciju ocena: za svaku ocenu prikaži broj ispita i postotak od ukupnog broja ispita. Sortiraj po oceni.
hint: GROUP BY grade, COUNT(*). Za postotak: ROUND(100.0 * COUNT(*) / (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM exams), 1).
solution:
SELECT
  grade,
  COUNT(*) AS exam_count,
  ROUND(
    100.0 * COUNT(*) / (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM exams),
    1
  ) AS percentage
FROM exams
GROUP BY grade
ORDER BY grade;

title: ECTS distribution
description: Prikaži distribuciju ECTS bodova: za svaku ECTS vrijednost prikaži broj predmeta i ukupan ECTS koji ta vrijednost doprinosi. Sortiraj po ECTS.
hint: GROUP BY ects. COUNT(*) broji predmete, COUNT(*) * ects daje ukupni doprinos.
solution:
SELECT
  ects,
  COUNT(*) AS subject_count,
  COUNT(*) * ects AS total_ects_contribution
FROM subjects
GROUP BY ects
ORDER BY ects;

title: Duplicate student names
description: Pronađi kombinacije first_name + last_name koje se pojavljuju više od jedanput u tabeli students — potencijalni duplikati. Prikaži ime, prezime i broj pojava.
hint: GROUP BY first_name, last_name, HAVING COUNT(*) > 1. Ako je rezultat prazan, baza nema duplikata — to je dobar znak.
solution:
SELECT
  first_name,
  last_name,
  COUNT(*) AS occurrences
FROM students
GROUP BY first_name, last_name
HAVING COUNT(*) > 1
ORDER BY occurrences DESC, last_name;

title: Students without exams (NOT EXISTS)
description: Pronađi studente koji nisu izašli ni na jedan ispit. Koristi NOT EXISTS. Prikaži ime, prezime, broj indeksa i godinu upisa.
hint: WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM exams e WHERE e.student_id = s.id) — korisan za data quality jer pokazuje studente koji bi trebali imati ispite.
solution:
SELECT
  first_name,
  last_name,
  index_number,
  enrollment_year
FROM students s
WHERE NOT EXISTS (
  SELECT 1
  FROM exams e
  WHERE e.student_id = s.id
)
ORDER BY last_name;

title: Subjects without exams (LEFT JOIN + IS NULL)
description: Pronađi predmete koji nikad nisu bili na ispitu koristeći LEFT JOIN. Prikaži naziv predmeta, ECTS i semestar.
hint: LEFT JOIN subjects sa exams. Gdje nema para, e.subject_id je NULL — to su predmeti bez ijednog ispita. Napomena: ako upit vrati 0 redova, to znači da svaki predmet u bazi ima bar jedan ispit — to je ispravan rezultat.
solution:
SELECT
  sub.name AS subject_name,
  sub.ects,
  sub.semester
FROM subjects sub
LEFT JOIN exams e ON sub.id = e.subject_id
WHERE e.subject_id IS NULL
ORDER BY sub.name;

title: Departments without assigned subjects
description: Pronađi departmane kojima nije dodijeljen nijedan predmet (u tabeli subjects.department_id). Prikaži naziv departmana, lokaciju i naziv fakulteta.
hint: LEFT JOIN departments sa subjects ON d.id = sub.department_id. Gdje nema para, sub.department_id je NULL.
solution:
SELECT
  d.name     AS department_name,
  d.location,
  f.name     AS faculty_name
FROM departments d
LEFT JOIN subjects sub ON d.id = sub.department_id
INNER JOIN faculties f  ON d.faculty_id = f.id
WHERE sub.department_id IS NULL
ORDER BY f.name, d.name;

title: Faculties without departments
description: Pronađi fakultete koji nemaju nijedan departman registrovan u tabeli departments. Prikaži naziv i grad.
hint: LEFT JOIN faculties sa departments ON f.id = d.faculty_id. Gdje nema para, d.faculty_id je NULL.
solution:
SELECT
  f.name,
  f.city
FROM faculties f
LEFT JOIN departments d ON f.id = d.faculty_id
WHERE d.faculty_id IS NULL
ORDER BY f.name;

title: CAST: grade display formatting
description: Za prvih 10 ispita prikaži ocenu kao tekst u formatu 'N/10' i normalizovanu ocenu (0.0 do 1.0, dvije decimale). Koristi CAST za konverziju tipa.
hint: CAST(grade AS TEXT) pretvara smallint u string za konkatenaciju. CAST(grade AS NUMERIC) / 10 daje decimalni rezultat.
solution:
SELECT
  student_id,
  subject_id,
  grade,
  CAST(grade AS TEXT) || '/10'          AS grade_display,
  ROUND(CAST(grade AS NUMERIC) / 10, 2) AS grade_normalized
FROM exams
ORDER BY grade DESC
LIMIT 10;

title: NULL percentage across nullable columns
description: Prikaži analizu NULL vrijednosti za sve nullable kolone: students.department_id, subjects.department_id i professors.department_id. Za svaku kolonu prikaži ukupan broj redova, broj NULL i postotak NULL.
hint: Koristi UNION ALL s po jednim SELECT po koloni. COUNT(*) - COUNT(kolona) daje broj NULL-ova. ORDER BY null_pct DESC.
solution:
SELECT
  'students.department_id'   AS nullable_column,
  COUNT(*)                   AS total_rows,
  COUNT(*) - COUNT(department_id)  AS null_count,
  ROUND(100.0 * (COUNT(*) - COUNT(department_id)) / COUNT(*), 1) AS null_pct
FROM students
UNION ALL
SELECT
  'subjects.department_id',
  COUNT(*),
  COUNT(*) - COUNT(department_id),
  ROUND(100.0 * (COUNT(*) - COUNT(department_id)) / COUNT(*), 1)
FROM subjects
UNION ALL
SELECT
  'professors.department_id',
  COUNT(*),
  COUNT(*) - COUNT(department_id),
  ROUND(100.0 * (COUNT(*) - COUNT(department_id)) / COUNT(*), 1)
FROM professors
ORDER BY null_pct DESC;

title: Data quality summary
description: Napravi sveobuhvatni pregled kvaliteta baze: provjeri 6 potencijalnih problema i prikaži broj zahvaćenih zapisa za svaki. Sortiraj po broju problema opadajuće.
hint: Koristi UNION ALL za kombinovanje 6 provjera u jedan rezultat. Svaki SELECT provjava drugačiji data quality problem koristeći IS NULL ili NOT IN subquery.
solution:
SELECT 'Studenti bez departmana'   AS issue, COUNT(*) AS count FROM students   WHERE department_id IS NULL
UNION ALL
SELECT 'Predmeti bez departmana',    COUNT(*) FROM subjects   WHERE department_id IS NULL
UNION ALL
SELECT 'Studenti bez ispita',         COUNT(*) FROM students   WHERE id NOT IN (SELECT DISTINCT student_id   FROM exams)
UNION ALL
SELECT 'Predmeti bez ispita',         COUNT(*) FROM subjects   WHERE id NOT IN (SELECT DISTINCT subject_id    FROM exams)
UNION ALL
SELECT 'Profesori bez predmeta',      COUNT(*) FROM professors WHERE id NOT IN (SELECT DISTINCT professor_id  FROM professor_subjects)
UNION ALL
SELECT 'Fakulteti bez departmana',    COUNT(*) FROM faculties  WHERE id NOT IN (SELECT DISTINCT faculty_id   FROM departments)
ORDER BY count DESC, issue;

title: Project: Average grade per student
description: Za svakog studenta koji je izašao na bar jedan ispit prikaži ime, prezime, broj indeksa, ukupan broj ispita i prosečnu ocenu. Sortiraj po prosečnoj oceni opadajuće.
hint: JOIN students i exams, GROUP BY po student ID-u i svim kolonama u SELECT-u, ROUND(AVG(e.grade), 2) za prosek.
solution:
SELECT
  s.first_name,
  s.last_name,
  s.index_number,
  COUNT(*)               AS total_exams,
  ROUND(AVG(e.grade), 2) AS avg_grade
FROM students s
INNER JOIN exams e ON s.id = e.student_id
GROUP BY s.id, s.first_name, s.last_name, s.index_number
ORDER BY avg_grade DESC, s.last_name;

title: Passed and failed exams per student
description: Za svakog studenta koji je izašao na ispite prikaži ime, prezime, ukupan broj ispita, broj položenih i broj nepoloženih. Koristi CASE WHEN unutar COUNT. Sortiraj po prezimenu.
hint: COUNT(CASE WHEN e.passed THEN 1 END) broji samo redove gdje je uslov ispunjen. Kombiniraj sa INNER JOIN i GROUP BY.
solution:
SELECT
  s.first_name,
  s.last_name,
  COUNT(*)                                    AS total_exams,
  COUNT(CASE WHEN e.passed THEN 1 END)        AS passed_count,
  COUNT(CASE WHEN NOT e.passed THEN 1 END)    AS failed_count
FROM students s
INNER JOIN exams e ON s.id = e.student_id
GROUP BY s.id, s.first_name, s.last_name
ORDER BY s.last_name, s.first_name;

title: Project: Students with average grade above 8
description: Prikaži samo studente čija je prosečna ocena na ispitima veća od 8. Prikaži ime, prezime, broj indeksa, prosečnu ocenu i ukupan broj ispita. Sortiraj po prosečnoj oceni opadajuće.
hint: HAVING AVG(e.grade) > 8 filtrira grupe nakon GROUP BY. Prosek se računa nad svim ispitima studenta.
solution:
SELECT
  s.first_name,
  s.last_name,
  s.index_number,
  ROUND(AVG(e.grade), 2) AS avg_grade,
  COUNT(*)               AS total_exams
FROM students s
INNER JOIN exams e ON s.id = e.student_id
GROUP BY s.id, s.first_name, s.last_name, s.index_number
HAVING AVG(e.grade) > 8
ORDER BY avg_grade DESC;

title: Student ranking by average grade
description: Rangiraj sve studente koji su izašli na ispite po prosečnoj oceni od najboljeg ka najlošijem. Prikaži ime, prezime, prosečnu ocenu, ukupan broj ispita i rang. Studenti s jednakim prosjekom dobijaju isti rang.
hint: CTE izračunava proseke po studentu. Spoljašnji SELECT primjenjuje RANK() OVER(ORDER BY avg_grade DESC) na taj CTE rezultat.
solution:
WITH student_avg AS (
  SELECT
    s.id,
    s.first_name,
    s.last_name,
    ROUND(AVG(e.grade), 2) AS avg_grade,
    COUNT(*)               AS total_exams
  FROM students s
  INNER JOIN exams e ON s.id = e.student_id
  GROUP BY s.id, s.first_name, s.last_name
)
SELECT
  first_name,
  last_name,
  avg_grade,
  total_exams,
  RANK() OVER (ORDER BY avg_grade DESC) AS grade_rank
FROM student_avg
ORDER BY grade_rank, last_name;

title: Best student per department
description: Za svaki departman pronađi studenta s najvišom prosečnom ocenom. Prikaži naziv departmana, ime i prezime studenta i prosečnu ocenu. Ako više studenata dijeli maksimum, prikaži sve.
hint: CTE student_avg računa prosek po studentu (samo studenti s departmanom). CTE dept_best uzima MAX(avg_grade) po departmanu. Finalni JOIN filtrira studente na maksimumu.
solution:
WITH student_avg AS (
  SELECT
    s.id,
    s.first_name,
    s.last_name,
    s.department_id,
    ROUND(AVG(e.grade), 2) AS avg_grade
  FROM students s
  INNER JOIN exams e ON s.id = e.student_id
  WHERE s.department_id IS NOT NULL
  GROUP BY s.id, s.first_name, s.last_name, s.department_id
),
dept_best AS (
  SELECT department_id, MAX(avg_grade) AS best_avg
  FROM student_avg
  GROUP BY department_id
)
SELECT
  d.name        AS department_name,
  sa.first_name,
  sa.last_name,
  sa.avg_grade
FROM student_avg sa
INNER JOIN dept_best db
  ON sa.department_id = db.department_id
  AND sa.avg_grade    = db.best_avg
INNER JOIN departments d ON sa.department_id = d.id
ORDER BY d.name, sa.last_name;

title: Student performance summary
description: Za svakog studenta koji ima ispite prikaži: ime, prezime, departman, ukupan broj ispita, prosečnu ocenu, broj položenih, procenat položenosti i performans (Odličan/Vrlo dobar/Dobar/Dovoljan). Sortiraj po prosečnoj oceni opadajuće.
hint: INNER JOIN exams, LEFT JOIN departments (ne mora imati departman). COUNT(CASE WHEN passed...) za položene. CASE WHEN nad AVG(grade) za performans kategoriju.
solution:
SELECT
  s.first_name,
  s.last_name,
  COALESCE(d.name, 'Bez departmana')                AS department_name,
  COUNT(*)                                          AS total_exams,
  ROUND(AVG(e.grade), 2)                            AS avg_grade,
  COUNT(CASE WHEN e.passed THEN 1 END)              AS passed_count,
  ROUND(
    100.0 * COUNT(CASE WHEN e.passed THEN 1 END) / COUNT(*),
    1
  )                                                 AS pass_rate_pct,
  CASE
    WHEN AVG(e.grade) >= 9.0 THEN 'Odličan'
    WHEN AVG(e.grade) >= 7.5 THEN 'Vrlo dobar'
    WHEN AVG(e.grade) >= 6.5 THEN 'Dobar'
    ELSE                          'Dovoljan'
  END                                               AS performance
FROM students s
INNER JOIN exams e        ON s.id           = e.student_id
LEFT  JOIN departments d  ON s.department_id = d.id
GROUP BY s.id, s.first_name, s.last_name, d.name
ORDER BY avg_grade DESC, s.last_name;

title: Number of departments per faculty
description: Za svaki fakultet prikaži naziv, grad i broj departmana koji mu pripadaju. Uključi i fakultete bez departmana (broj = 0). Sortiraj po broju departmana opadajuće.
hint: LEFT JOIN faculties sa departments da uključiš i fakultete bez departmana. COUNT(d.id) — ne COUNT(*) — broji samo sparene redove.
solution:
SELECT
  f.name          AS faculty_name,
  f.city,
  COUNT(d.id)     AS num_departments
FROM faculties f
LEFT JOIN departments d ON f.id = d.faculty_id
GROUP BY f.id, f.name, f.city
ORDER BY num_departments DESC, f.name;

title: Number of students per faculty
description: Za svaki fakultet prikaži naziv, grad i broj studenata koji studiraju na njemu. Uključi i fakultete bez studenata. Sortiraj po broju studenata opadajuće.
hint: LEFT JOIN faculties sa students koristeći f.id = s.faculty_id. COUNT(s.id) broji samo studente koji postoje.
solution:
SELECT
  f.name          AS faculty_name,
  f.city,
  COUNT(s.id)     AS num_students
FROM faculties f
LEFT JOIN students s ON f.id = s.faculty_id
GROUP BY f.id, f.name, f.city
ORDER BY num_students DESC, f.name;

title: Number of subjects per faculty
description: Za svaki fakultet prikaži naziv, grad, broj predmeta i ukupan ECTS koji se nudi na tom fakultetu. Uključi i fakultete bez predmeta. Sortiraj po broju predmeta opadajuće.
hint: LEFT JOIN faculties sa subjects. COUNT(sub.id) i COALESCE(SUM(sub.ects), 0) za slučaj kad nema predmeta.
solution:
SELECT
  f.name                        AS faculty_name,
  f.city,
  COUNT(sub.id)                 AS num_subjects,
  COALESCE(SUM(sub.ects), 0)    AS total_ects
FROM faculties f
LEFT JOIN subjects sub ON f.id = sub.faculty_id
GROUP BY f.id, f.name, f.city
ORDER BY num_subjects DESC, f.name;

title: Average grade per faculty
description: Za svaki fakultet koji ima studente s položenim ispitima prikaži naziv, grad, broj različitih studenata koji su izašli na ispite, ukupan broj ispita i prosečnu ocenu. Sortiraj po prosečnoj oceni opadajuće.
hint: JOIN lanac: faculties → students (faculty_id) → exams (student_id). COUNT(DISTINCT s.id) za broj studenata, AVG(e.grade) za prosek.
solution:
SELECT
  f.name                       AS faculty_name,
  f.city,
  COUNT(DISTINCT s.id)         AS num_students_examined,
  COUNT(*)                     AS total_exams,
  ROUND(AVG(e.grade), 2)       AS avg_grade
FROM faculties f
INNER JOIN students s ON f.id = s.faculty_id
INNER JOIN exams e    ON s.id = e.student_id
GROUP BY f.id, f.name, f.city
ORDER BY avg_grade DESC;

title: Project: Faculties without departments
description: Pronađi fakultete koji nemaju nijedan departman registrovan u tabeli departments. Prikaži naziv, grad i naziv univerziteta.
hint: LEFT JOIN faculties sa departments. Gdje nema para, d.faculty_id je NULL — to su fakulteti bez departmana.
solution:
SELECT
  f.name,
  f.city,
  f.university_name
FROM faculties f
LEFT JOIN departments d ON f.id = d.faculty_id
WHERE d.faculty_id IS NULL
ORDER BY f.name;

title: Project: Faculty summary
description: Za svaki fakultet prikaži: naziv, grad, broj departmana, broj studenata, broj predmeta i prosečnu ocenu ispita. Koristi više CTE-ova da izbjegneš Cartesian product. Sortiraj po broju studenata opadajuće.
hint: Svaki CTE računa jednu metriku po faculty_id (dept_count, student_count, subject_count, exam_stats). Finalni SELECT LEFT JOIN-uje sve CTE-ove sa faculties.
solution:
WITH dept_count AS (
  SELECT faculty_id, COUNT(*) AS num_departments
  FROM departments
  GROUP BY faculty_id
),
student_count AS (
  SELECT faculty_id, COUNT(*) AS num_students
  FROM students
  GROUP BY faculty_id
),
subject_count AS (
  SELECT faculty_id, COUNT(*) AS num_subjects
  FROM subjects
  GROUP BY faculty_id
),
exam_stats AS (
  SELECT s.faculty_id,
    ROUND(AVG(e.grade), 2) AS avg_grade
  FROM students s
  INNER JOIN exams e ON s.id = e.student_id
  GROUP BY s.faculty_id
)
SELECT
  f.name                          AS faculty_name,
  f.city,
  COALESCE(dc.num_departments, 0) AS num_departments,
  COALESCE(sc.num_students, 0)    AS num_students,
  COALESCE(su.num_subjects, 0)    AS num_subjects,
  es.avg_grade
FROM faculties f
LEFT JOIN dept_count    dc ON f.id = dc.faculty_id
LEFT JOIN student_count sc ON f.id = sc.faculty_id
LEFT JOIN subject_count su ON f.id = su.faculty_id
LEFT JOIN exam_stats    es ON f.id = es.faculty_id
ORDER BY COALESCE(sc.num_students, 0) DESC;

title: Average grade per subject
description: Za svaki predmet koji je bio na ispitu prikaži naziv, ECTS, ukupan broj pokušaja i prosečnu ocenu. Sortiraj po prosečnoj oceni opadajuće.
hint: INNER JOIN subjects i exams (samo predmeti koji su bili na ispitu). GROUP BY sub.id i svim SELECT kolonama, ROUND(AVG, 2) za prosek.
solution:
SELECT
  sub.name               AS subject_name,
  sub.ects,
  COUNT(*)               AS total_attempts,
  ROUND(AVG(e.grade), 2) AS avg_grade
FROM subjects sub
INNER JOIN exams e ON sub.id = e.subject_id
GROUP BY sub.id, sub.name, sub.ects
ORDER BY avg_grade DESC;

title: Pass rate per subject
description: Za svaki predmet na ispitu prikaži naziv, ukupan broj pokušaja, broj položenih ispita i procenat položenosti zaokružen na jednu decimalu. Sortiraj po procentu položenosti opadajuće.
hint: COUNT(CASE WHEN e.passed THEN 1 END) broji položene. Procenat: 100.0 * položeni / ukupno. Množ sa 100.0 (ne 100) za decimalni rezultat.
solution:
SELECT
  sub.name                                          AS subject_name,
  COUNT(*)                                          AS total_attempts,
  COUNT(CASE WHEN e.passed THEN 1 END)              AS passed_count,
  ROUND(
    100.0 * COUNT(CASE WHEN e.passed THEN 1 END) / COUNT(*),
    1
  )                                                 AS pass_rate_pct
FROM subjects sub
INNER JOIN exams e ON sub.id = e.subject_id
GROUP BY sub.id, sub.name
ORDER BY pass_rate_pct DESC;

title: Number of exam attempts per subject
description: Za svaki predmet prikaži naziv, ECTS, semestar, ukupan broj pokušaja ispita i broj različitih studenata koji su izašli. Sortiraj po ukupnom broju pokušaja opadajuće.
hint: COUNT(*) daje ukupan broj redova (pokušaja), COUNT(DISTINCT e.student_id) daje broj jedinstvenih studenata.
solution:
SELECT
  sub.name                     AS subject_name,
  sub.ects,
  sub.semester,
  COUNT(*)                     AS total_attempts,
  COUNT(DISTINCT e.student_id) AS unique_students
FROM subjects sub
INNER JOIN exams e ON sub.id = e.subject_id
GROUP BY sub.id, sub.name, sub.ects, sub.semester
ORDER BY total_attempts DESC;

title: Hardest subjects by pass rate
description: Prikaži predmete sortirane od najtežeg (najmanji procenat položenosti) ka najlakšem. Za svaki predmet prikaži naziv, broj pokušaja, procenat položenosti i prosečnu ocenu.
hint: Isti upit kao pass rate, ali ORDER BY pass_rate_pct ASC da najtežu predmeti budu prvi. Dodaj avg_grade kao sekundarni kriterijum.
solution:
SELECT
  sub.name                  AS subject_name,
  COUNT(*)                  AS total_attempts,
  ROUND(
    100.0 * COUNT(CASE WHEN e.passed THEN 1 END) / COUNT(*),
    1
  )                         AS pass_rate_pct,
  ROUND(AVG(e.grade), 2)    AS avg_grade
FROM subjects sub
INNER JOIN exams e ON sub.id = e.subject_id
GROUP BY sub.id, sub.name
ORDER BY pass_rate_pct ASC, avg_grade ASC;

title: Subjects with most failed exams
description: Prikaži predmete sortirane po apsolutnom broju nepoloženih ispita opadajuće. Za svaki predmet prikaži naziv, ukupan broj pokušaja, broj nepoloženih i stopu pada (fail rate %).
hint: COUNT(CASE WHEN NOT e.passed THEN 1 END) broji nepoložene. Sortiranje po failed_count opadajuće pokazuje predmete s najviše padova.
solution:
SELECT
  sub.name                                        AS subject_name,
  COUNT(*)                                        AS total_attempts,
  COUNT(CASE WHEN NOT e.passed THEN 1 END)        AS failed_count,
  ROUND(
    100.0 * COUNT(CASE WHEN NOT e.passed THEN 1 END) / COUNT(*),
    1
  )                                               AS fail_rate_pct
FROM subjects sub
INNER JOIN exams e ON sub.id = e.subject_id
GROUP BY sub.id, sub.name
ORDER BY failed_count DESC, fail_rate_pct DESC;

title: Subject difficulty classification
description: Za svaki predmet na ispitu izračunaj prosečnu ocenu i procenat položenosti, pa ga klasifikuj: Easy (avg >= 8 i pass rate >= 75%), Medium (avg >= 7 i pass rate >= 55%), inače Hard. Sortiraj po prosečnoj oceni opadajuće.
hint: CTE subject_stats računa sve metrike po predmetu. Finalni SELECT dodaje CASE WHEN klasifikaciju na osnovu avg_grade i pass_rate_pct iz CTE-a.
solution:
WITH subject_stats AS (
  SELECT
    sub.name                  AS subject_name,
    sub.ects,
    COUNT(*)                  AS total_attempts,
    ROUND(AVG(e.grade), 2)    AS avg_grade,
    ROUND(
      100.0 * COUNT(CASE WHEN e.passed THEN 1 END) / COUNT(*),
      1
    )                         AS pass_rate_pct
  FROM subjects sub
  INNER JOIN exams e ON sub.id = e.subject_id
  GROUP BY sub.id, sub.name, sub.ects
)
SELECT
  subject_name,
  ects,
  total_attempts,
  avg_grade,
  pass_rate_pct,
  CASE
    WHEN avg_grade >= 8.0 AND pass_rate_pct >= 75 THEN 'Easy'
    WHEN avg_grade >= 7.0 AND pass_rate_pct >= 55 THEN 'Medium'
    ELSE 'Hard'
  END AS difficulty_class
FROM subject_stats
ORDER BY avg_grade DESC;

title: Project: Number of subjects per professor
description: Za svakog profesora prikaži titulu, ime, prezime i broj predmeta koji mu je dodijeljen. Uključi i profesore bez predmeta (broj = 0). Sortiraj po broju predmeta opadajuće.
hint: LEFT JOIN professors sa professor_subjects. COUNT(ps.subject_id) — ne COUNT(*) — da profesori bez predmeta dobiju 0.
solution:
SELECT
  p.title,
  p.first_name,
  p.last_name,
  COUNT(ps.subject_id) AS num_subjects
FROM professors p
LEFT JOIN professor_subjects ps ON p.id = ps.professor_id
GROUP BY p.id, p.title, p.first_name, p.last_name
ORDER BY num_subjects DESC, p.last_name;

title: Professors without subjects
description: Pronađi profesore koji nemaju nijedan predmet dodijeljen u tabeli professor_subjects. Prikaži titulu, ime, prezime i email.
hint: LEFT JOIN professors sa professor_subjects. Gdje nema para, ps.professor_id je NULL — to su profesori bez predmeta.
solution:
SELECT
  p.title,
  p.first_name,
  p.last_name,
  p.email
FROM professors p
LEFT JOIN professor_subjects ps ON p.id = ps.professor_id
WHERE ps.professor_id IS NULL
ORDER BY p.last_name, p.first_name;

title: Number of exams per professor
description: Za svakog profesora prikaži titulu, ime, prezime i broj ispita koje je ocijenio. Uključi i profesore koji nisu ocijenili nijedan ispit. Sortiraj po broju ispita opadajuće.
hint: LEFT JOIN professors sa exams koristeći p.id = e.professor_id. COUNT(e.grade) broji samo non-NULL vrijednosti.
solution:
SELECT
  p.title,
  p.first_name,
  p.last_name,
  COUNT(e.grade) AS num_exams
FROM professors p
LEFT JOIN exams e ON p.id = e.professor_id
GROUP BY p.id, p.title, p.first_name, p.last_name
ORDER BY num_exams DESC, p.last_name;

title: Average grade by professor
description: Za svakog profesora koji je ocijenio bar jedan ispit prikaži titulu, ime, prezime, ukupan broj ispita i prosečnu ocenu koju je dodijelio. Sortiraj po prosečnoj oceni opadajuće.
hint: INNER JOIN professors i exams (samo profesori s ispitima). GROUP BY professor, ROUND(AVG(e.grade), 2).
solution:
SELECT
  p.title,
  p.first_name,
  p.last_name,
  COUNT(*)               AS total_exams,
  ROUND(AVG(e.grade), 2) AS avg_grade
FROM professors p
INNER JOIN exams e ON p.id = e.professor_id
GROUP BY p.id, p.title, p.first_name, p.last_name
ORDER BY avg_grade DESC;

title: Professor workload category
description: Za svakog profesora prikaži titulu, ime, prezime, broj dodijeljenih predmeta i kategoriju opterećenja: 0 predmeta = 'No subjects', 1-2 = 'Low', 3-4 = 'Medium', 5+ = 'High'. Sortiraj po broju predmeta opadajuće.
hint: LEFT JOIN + GROUP BY za broj predmeta. CASE WHEN COUNT(ps.subject_id) = 0 THEN ... u SELECT-u klasifikuje svaki red.
solution:
SELECT
  p.title,
  p.first_name,
  p.last_name,
  COUNT(ps.subject_id) AS num_subjects,
  CASE
    WHEN COUNT(ps.subject_id) = 0  THEN 'No subjects'
    WHEN COUNT(ps.subject_id) <= 2 THEN 'Low'
    WHEN COUNT(ps.subject_id) <= 4 THEN 'Medium'
    ELSE 'High'
  END AS workload_category
FROM professors p
LEFT JOIN professor_subjects ps ON p.id = ps.professor_id
GROUP BY p.id, p.title, p.first_name, p.last_name
ORDER BY num_subjects DESC, p.last_name;

title: Professor workload summary
description: Za svakog profesora prikaži: titulu, ime, prezime, departman, broj dodijeljenih predmeta, broj ocijenjenih ispita i prosečnu ocenu. Koristi CTE-ove za čist kod. Sortiraj po broju predmeta opadajuće.
hint: CTE prof_subjects broji predmete po profesoru. CTE prof_exams broji ispite i računa prosek. Finalni SELECT LEFT JOIN-uje oba CTE-a sa professors i departments.
solution:
WITH prof_subjects AS (
  SELECT professor_id, COUNT(*) AS num_subjects
  FROM professor_subjects
  GROUP BY professor_id
),
prof_exams AS (
  SELECT professor_id,
    COUNT(*)               AS num_exams,
    ROUND(AVG(grade), 2)   AS avg_grade
  FROM exams
  GROUP BY professor_id
)
SELECT
  p.title,
  p.first_name,
  p.last_name,
  COALESCE(d.name, 'Bez departmana') AS department_name,
  COALESCE(ps.num_subjects, 0)       AS num_subjects,
  COALESCE(pe.num_exams, 0)          AS num_exams,
  pe.avg_grade
FROM professors p
LEFT JOIN departments   d  ON p.department_id = d.id
LEFT JOIN prof_subjects ps ON p.id            = ps.professor_id
LEFT JOIN prof_exams    pe ON p.id            = pe.professor_id
ORDER BY num_subjects DESC, p.last_name;

title: Exams by year
description: Grupiši sve ispite po godini. Za svaku godinu prikaži godinu, ukupan broj ispita, broj različitih studenata koji su izašli i prosečnu ocenu. Sortiraj hronološki.
hint: EXTRACT(YEAR FROM exam_date)::INT za godinu. GROUP BY EXTRACT(YEAR FROM exam_date). COUNT(DISTINCT student_id) za jedinstvene studente.
solution:
SELECT
  EXTRACT(YEAR FROM exam_date)::INT AS exam_year,
  COUNT(*)                          AS total_exams,
  COUNT(DISTINCT student_id)        AS unique_students,
  ROUND(AVG(grade), 2)              AS avg_grade
FROM exams
GROUP BY EXTRACT(YEAR FROM exam_date)
ORDER BY exam_year;

title: Exams by month
description: Grupiši ispite po godini i mesecu koristeći DATE_TRUNC. Za svaki mesec prikaži mesec (kao datum prvog dana), ukupan broj ispita i prosečnu ocenu. Sortiraj hronološki.
hint: DATE_TRUNC('month', exam_date)::DATE skraćuje datum na prvi dan meseca — idealno za grupovanje po periodu.
solution:
SELECT
  DATE_TRUNC('month', exam_date)::DATE AS exam_month,
  COUNT(*)                             AS total_exams,
  ROUND(AVG(grade), 2)                 AS avg_grade
FROM exams
GROUP BY DATE_TRUNC('month', exam_date)
ORDER BY exam_month;

title: Average grade by month with pass rate
description: Za svaki mesec prikaži: mesec (datum prvog dana), broj ispita, prosečnu ocenu, broj položenih i procenat položenosti. Sortiraj hronološki. Kombinuje DATE_TRUNC, AVG i CASE WHEN.
hint: GROUP BY DATE_TRUNC('month', exam_date). Dodaj COUNT(CASE WHEN passed THEN 1 END) za položene i izračunaj procenat sa 100.0 * položeni / ukupno.
solution:
SELECT
  DATE_TRUNC('month', exam_date)::DATE AS exam_month,
  COUNT(*)                             AS total_exams,
  ROUND(AVG(grade), 2)                 AS avg_grade,
  COUNT(CASE WHEN passed THEN 1 END)   AS passed_count,
  ROUND(
    100.0 * COUNT(CASE WHEN passed THEN 1 END) / COUNT(*),
    1
  )                                    AS pass_rate_pct
FROM exams
GROUP BY DATE_TRUNC('month', exam_date)
ORDER BY exam_month;

title: First and last exam per student
description: Za svakog studenta koji ima ispite prikaži ime, prezime, datum prvog ispita, datum posljednjeg ispita, broj dana koliko je bio aktivan i ukupan broj ispita. Sortiraj po broju dana aktivnosti opadajuće.
hint: MIN(e.exam_date) i MAX(e.exam_date) u GROUP BY. Oduzimanje dvaju DATE vrijednosti u PostgreSQL-u vraća INTEGER (broj dana).
solution:
SELECT
  s.first_name,
  s.last_name,
  MIN(e.exam_date)                        AS first_exam_date,
  MAX(e.exam_date)                        AS last_exam_date,
  MAX(e.exam_date) - MIN(e.exam_date)     AS days_active,
  COUNT(*)                                AS total_exams
FROM students s
INNER JOIN exams e ON s.id = e.student_id
GROUP BY s.id, s.first_name, s.last_name
ORDER BY days_active DESC, s.last_name;

title: Days between student exams
description: Za svaki ispit prikaži ime i prezime studenta, datum ispita, ocenu, datum prethodnog ispita tog studenta i broj dana između ta dva ispita. Za prvi ispit prethodnih podataka nema (NULL). Sortiraj po prezimenu pa po datumu.
hint: LAG(e.exam_date) OVER(PARTITION BY e.student_id ORDER BY e.exam_date) vraća datum prethodnog ispita. Oduzimanje DATE vrijednosti daje broj dana kao INTEGER.
solution:
SELECT
  s.first_name,
  s.last_name,
  e.exam_date,
  e.grade,
  LAG(e.exam_date) OVER (
    PARTITION BY e.student_id ORDER BY e.exam_date
  )                     AS prev_exam_date,
  e.exam_date - LAG(e.exam_date) OVER (
    PARTITION BY e.student_id ORDER BY e.exam_date
  )                     AS days_between
FROM students s
INNER JOIN exams e ON s.id = e.student_id
ORDER BY s.last_name, s.first_name, e.exam_date;

title: Monthly exam trend with running total
description: Prikaži mesečni trend ispita: za svaki mesec prikaži broj ispita, prosečnu ocenu i kumulativni ukupan broj ispita do tog meseca (running total). Koristi CTE + SUM() OVER(ORDER BY).
hint: CTE monthly_exams grupiše po DATE_TRUNC('month', ...). Spoljašnji SELECT primjenjuje SUM(monthly_count) OVER(ORDER BY exam_month) za kumulativni zbir.
solution:
WITH monthly_exams AS (
  SELECT
    DATE_TRUNC('month', exam_date)::DATE AS exam_month,
    COUNT(*)                             AS monthly_count,
    ROUND(AVG(grade), 2)                 AS avg_grade
  FROM exams
  GROUP BY DATE_TRUNC('month', exam_date)
)
SELECT
  exam_month,
  monthly_count,
  avg_grade,
  SUM(monthly_count) OVER (ORDER BY exam_month) AS running_total
FROM monthly_exams
ORDER BY exam_month;
